Spread more sauce over the top slice of your bun and place it over the burger. 25. Burgers are ready to serve. Potato wedges, boiled corn, cheese balls are some of the great sides.

title: Veg Cheese Sandwich
ingredients: 0.25 cup carrots, 0.25 cup bell peppers, 0.25 cup sweet corn, 0.25 cup onion, 1 garlic, 1 green chili pepper, 0.25 teaspoon black pepper, 0.625 teaspoon herbs, 2.5 tablespoons cilantro, 6 slices bread, 2 tablespoons unsalted butter, 0.875 cup mozzarella cheese
instructions: 1. Since we don’t cook the veggies in this recipe it is good to choose those which can be eaten raw like carrots, onions, capsicum, tender sweet corn, spring onions and cabbage. I have used grated carrots, chopped onions, frozen sweet corn and capsicum along with 2 green chilies for heat and cilantro/coriander leaves. 2. Add the chopped veggies to a bowl and sprinkle some herbs if you have else sub them with just crushed pepper & red chilli flakes. I added only a generous pinch of salt, since cheese is already salted. 3. Next add cheese. 4. Mix everything well. Taste test and adjust the seasoning to your preference. 5. Smear 1 tablespoon soft butter over one side (inner) of the bread slice. Spread the filling on the other side. Cover with another slice. 6. Pop them in a preheated sandwich maker. If you want to make it on a pan, heat the pan. Place the sandwiches and press down gently. Toast until golden on a low heat until the cheese melts. 7. Sandwich Recip... Cheese Sandwich R... Veg Grilled Sandw... Bombay Sandwich R... Potato Sandwich R... Paneer Bhurji San...

title: Veg Chowmein Recipe | Vegetable Chow Mein Noodles
ingredients: water, 1 tbsp salt, 2 pack hakka noodles, 2 tsp oil, 2 tbsp oil, 2 chilli, 1 inch ginger, 5 cloves garlic, 1 onion, 2 tbsp spring onion, 1 carrot, 1 cup cabbage, 0.5 capsicum, 0.5 tsp salt, 0.5 tsp pepper powder, 2 tbsp tomato sauce, 1 tbsp chilli sauce, 2 tsp soy sauce, 1 tbsp vinegar, 2 tbsp spring onion
instructions: 1. Firstly, in a large vessel get the water to a boil. 2. Add 1 tbsp salt and 2 pack hakka noodles. 3. Stir and boil for 3 minutes or until the noodles are cooked al dente. 4. Drain off the noodles and make sure the noodles are not overcooked. 5. Rinse in cold water to stop from overcooking. 6. Transfer the noodles to a large plate and coat them with 2 tsp oil to prevent them from sticking to each other. Keep aside. 7. In a large wok, heat 2 tbsp oil. Add 2 chilli, 1 inch ginger and 5 cloves garlic. Stir fry on high flame. 8. Add 1 onion, 2 tbsp spring onion and stir fry on high flame. 9. Further add 1 carrot, 1 cup cabbage and ½ capsicum. 10. Stir fry on high flame till the vegetables turn crunchy. 11. Add boiled noodles, ½ tsp salt and ½ tsp pepper powder. 12. Also add 2 tbsp tomato sauce, 1 tbsp chilli sauce, 2 tsp soy sauce and 1 tbsp vinegar. 13. Toss gently coating all the noodles with sauce. 14. Further add 2 tbsp spring onion and stir fry making sure everything is well combined. 15. Finally, enjoy Veg Chowmein Noodles with tomato sauce.

title: Veg Crispy Recipe | Crispy Veg Recipe | Veg Crispy Chinese Recipe
ingredients: 0.75 cup corn flour, 2 tbsp maida, 1 tsp chilli powder, 0.5 tsp ginger garlic paste, 0.5 tsp baking powder, 0.5 tsp salt, 0.5 cup water, 1 florets gobi cauliflower, 1 carrot, 1 mushroom, 5 beans, 0.5 capsicum, 5 baby corn, oil, 2 tbsp oil, 5 clove garlic, 2 chilli, 2 tbsp spring onion, 0.5 onion, 2 tbsp capsicum, 2 tbsp tomato sauce, 2 tbsp schezwan sauce, 2 tsp vinegar, 2 tsp soy sauce, 0.5 tsp chilli powder, 0.5 tsp salt, 0.5 tsp pepper powder
instructions: 1. Firstly, in a large bowl take ¾ cup corn flour, 2 tbsp maida, 1 tsp chilli powder, ½ tsp ginger garlic paste, ½ tsp baking powder, ½ tsp salt and ½ cup water. 2. mix well and prepare a smooth lump free batter. 3. Add in 10 florets gobi, 1 carrot, 10 mushroom, 5 beans, ½ capsicum and 5 baby corn. 4. Mix well making sure the batter is coated well. 5. Now deep fry in hot oil keeping the flame on medium. 6. Stir occasionally, until the vegetables turn crispy and golden brown. 7. Drain off and keep aside. 8. In a large wok heat 2 tbsp oil. saute 5 clove garlic, 2 chilli and 2 tbsp spring onion on high flame. 9. Add ½ onion, 2 tbsp capsicum and stir fry until the capsicum turns crunchy. 10. Make some space, add 2 tbsp tomato sauce, 2 tbsp schezwan sauce, 2 tsp vinegar, 2 tsp soy sauce, ½ tsp chilli powder, ½ tsp salt and ½ tsp pepper powder. 11. Stir fry on high flame making sure all the sauces are well combined. 12. Add in fried vegetables and 2 tbsp spring onion. 13. Mix well keeping the flame on high until the sauce is coated well. 14. Finally, enjoy Crispy Veg Recipe with tomato sauce

title: Veg Cutlet Recipe (Vegetable Cutlet)
ingredients: 2 cups potatoes, 0.5 cup green peas, 1 cup carrot, 0.5 cup beans, 3 tablespoon coriander leaves, 0.5 teaspoon salt, 0.75 teaspoon ginger grated, 1.5 green chilies, 0.625 teaspoon garam masala, 6 tablespoon bread crumbs, 4 tablespoons oil, 2 tablespoon besan, 0.5 cup bread crumbs
instructions: 1. Peel and chop potatoes to ¾ inch cubes, carrots to ½ inch and beans to smaller bits. 2. Steamer/pot - Transfer all the chopped vegetables & peas to a steamer basket and steam them until fork tender and not mushy or water logged.or Pressure cook – I pressure cook all the vegetables together for 2 whistles on a medium heat with half cup water. Drain any excess moisture left and use up in your soups. 3. Meanwhile, If you do not have bread crumbs, add some poha to a mixer jar and make a super fine powder. 4. Add the boiled vegetables to a mixing bowl, cool down slightly and mash them well with a masher. 5. Add bread crumbs, salt, grated ginger, garam masala, coriander leaves and chilies. Mix well to form a non-sticky dough. If using powdered poha, start with 2 tablespoon only and mix well. If it is still too sticky, add more crumbs or powder only as required. (See photos in the post for texture) 6. Taste test and add more salt or spices to your taste. Divide the cutlet dough to 13 to 14 parts. Roll to balls. 7. Flatten them gently and make thick patties. Keep them aside in a plate and cover to prevent drying. 8. In another plate add ¼ cup bread crumbs or powdered poha for the crust. To another mixing bowl, add besan or rice flour. Pour water just enough to make a slightly thin/runny batter. For a thicker crust, make a thicker batter 9. Arrange all the 3 - Cutlets plate, batter bowl & bread crumbs plate side by side. 10. Dip each vegetable cutlet in the batter to coat on both the sides. Then place them on the bread crumbs. Gently coat them with the crumbs all over. 11. Place them back on a plate aside. Repeat the same steps of dipping them in the batter and then the crumbs for all the veg cutlets. Leave this aside for about 5 to 10 minutes. 12. Just before frying, gently shake them off in the plate to remove the excess crumbs. 13. Lastly heat 1 tablespoon oil for shallow frying in a wide pan. When the oil turns hot, gently place the veg cutlet in the pan. 14. Fry them on both the sides until golden and crisp. Set aside and fry them in 2 batches using more oil as needed. 15. To bake the veg cutlet - Preheat the oven to 180 C/ 360 C for 15 mins and place the patties on a greased tray. Bake for about 15 mins on each side or until golden and crisp. 16. Serve veg cutlet with green chutney or any sauce.

title: veg cutlet recipe | vegetable cutlet recipe | easy veg cutlet recipe
ingredients: For veg mixture, 2 tbsp oil, 5 cloves garlic, 0.5 tsp chilli flakes, 1 onion, 1 carrot, 3 tbsp peas, 0.5 capsicum, 0.5 tsp turmeric, 0.5 tsp chilli pwoder, 0.5 tsp cumin powder, 0.5 tsp garam masala, 0.5 tsp pepper powder, 1 tsp salt, 3 potato, 2 slice bread, 0.25 cup milk, 0.5 cup poha, 2 tbsp coriander, 2 tbsp corn flour, For coating, 0.5 cup maida, 0.5 cup corn flour, 0.5 tsp pepper powder, 0.5 tsp salt, 0.5 cup water, bread crumbs, oil
instructions: 1. Firstly, in a pan heat 2 tbsp oil add 5 cloves garlic, ½ tsp chilli flakes and saute until the garlic turns aromatic. 2. add 1 onion and saute until the onion softens. 3. Additionally, add 1 carrot, 3 tbsp peas, ½ capsicum, ½ tsp turmeric, ½ tsp chilli powder, ½ tsp cumin powder, ½ tsp garam masala, ½ tsp pepper powder and 1 tsp salt. 4. Saute on low flame until the spices turn aromatic. 5. Now add 3 potato and mix well. 6. Transfer the mixture to a large bowl and allow to cool completely. 7. On a plate take 2 slice bread and pour ¼ cup milk. 8. Mash smooth making sure the bread turns dough texture. 9. Add bread to the cutlet mixture. Bread helps to make the cutlet crispy. 10. Also add ½ cup poha, 2 tbsp coriander and mix well. 11. If the mixture is sticky, add 2 tbsp corn flour and mix forming a dough. 12. Shape the cutlet into cylindrical shapes and keep it aside. 13. To prepare the slurry, in a bowl take ½ cup maida, ½ cup corn flour, ½ tsp pepper powder, ½ tsp salt and ½ cup water. 14. Mix well making sure the slurry is smooth and lump free. 15. Dip the cutlet into the slurry and coat it with breadcrumbs. 16. Deep fry the cutlet in hot oil stirring occasionally. 17. Fry until the cutlet turns golden brown and crispy. 18. Drain off the cutlet to remove excess oil. 19. Finally, enjoy Crispy Veg Cutlet Recipe with sauce.

title: Veg Dum Biryani (Vegetable Dum Biryani)
ingredients: 1 tbsp ginger garlic paste, 1 tsp biryani masala powder, 0.3333333333333333 tsp red chili powder, 0.125 tsp turmeric, 1 cup curd, 4 tbsp ghee, strands saffron, 3 tbsps milk, Raisins, Cashews, 1 onion, 8 florets cauliflower, 1 potato, 1 carrot, 1 handful green peas, 4.5 beans, 1.5 tbsp Mint leaves, 2 tbsp Coriander leaves, 2 green chilies, 2 inch cinnamon stick, 4 green cardamoms, 1 black cardamom, 2 strands mace, 1 star anise, 6 cloves 6 cloves, 1 bay leaf, 0.5 tsp shahi jeera, 1.5 cups basmathi rice, 0.25 tsp shahi jeera, 1 bay leaf, Salt
instructions: 1. Thinly slice onions and fry them in oil till golden and crisp. Set these aside half of this. If you are using store bought fried onions, you can skip this 2. In the same pan, add whole spices and saute till they begin to sizzle. 3. Add ginger garlic paste and fry till the raw smell goes off. 4. Add parboiled potatoes and the rest of vegetables. Fry for 2 to 3 minutes. 5. Add turmeric, masala powder and red chili powder. Mix and fry well for 2 minutes till you begin to get an aroma. 6. Pour 100 ml yogurt and mix. Cook till the vegetables are done to tender. You can cover and cook. Cook uncovered if there is lot of moisture after the veggies are cooked. 7. While the veggies cook. Bring lot of water to a boil and cook rice till al dente along with bay leaf and shahi jeera. The rice has to be cooked grainy and not mushy. Drain it off in a colander. Soak saffron in 3 tbsps of this hot water or hot milk. Set aside. 8. If you like to make a 2 layer veg biryani, set aside 1/3 of the cooked vegetable mix. Now mix together the rest of the cooked veggies, rest of the yogurt, mint, coriander, nuts and raisins, few fried onions. you can do it in a pressure cooker or any heavy bottom utensil. 9. Layer the rice over the vegetable mix. Then layer the 1/3 cooked vegetable mix or 2 pinches of masala powder. Sprinkle some fried onions, mint and coriander. 10. Layer rice over it again, then the fried onions, mint and coriander leaves and pour off the saffron milk. Fry nuts in a tbsp ghee, saute raisins and then pour this over the rice. Place a moist clean cloth to seal the rim. You can even use a foil or atta to seal the utensil. 11. Place the dum utensil on a hot tawa and cook for 5 minutes on a medium flame and then on low for 5 to 7 minutes based on the thickness of your utensil. 12. Serve hyderabadi veg biryani hot or warm in layers of rice and gravy. 13. Preheat the oven to 180 C and bake for 20 mins. if you feel it is still very moist beneath, bake for another 5 to 10 mins. This depends on what kind of baking dish you use. Usually ceramic ones get done faster.

title: Veg Dum Biryani | Hyderabadi Veg Biryani Recipe | Hyderabadi Biryani
ingredients: 1 cup curd, 2 tbsp ginger garlic paste, 2 chilli, 2 tsp lemon juice, 2 tsp oil, 0.5 tsp turmeric, 1 tsp chilli powder, 1 tsp coriander powder, 2 tbsp garam masala, 1 tsp salt, 2 potato, 5 beans, 1 carrot, 3 tbsp peas, 1 mushroom, 3 tbsp mint, 3 tbsp coriander, 2 cup basmati rice, water, spices, 3 chilli, 2 tbsp coriander, 2 tbsp mint, 2 tbsp salt, 2 tsp lemon juice, 1 tsp ghee, 2 tbsp ghee, 2 tbsp oil, 1 onion, 1 capsicum, fried onion, 0.5 cup saffron milk, 1 tsp biryani masala, 2 tsp ghee
instructions: 1. Firstly, in a bowl take 1 cup curd, 2 tbsp ginger garlic paste, 2 chilli, 2 tsp lemon juice, 2 tsp oil, ½ tsp turmeric, 1 tsp chilli powder, 1 tsp coriander powder, 2 tbsp garam masala and 1 tsp salt. 2. Whisk and mix well making sure everything is well combined. 3. Add 2 potato, 5 beans, 1 carrot, 3 tbsp peas, 10 mushroom, 3 tbsp mint and 3 tbsp coriander. 4. Mix well making sure everything is well combined. cover and marinate for 30 minutes. 5. Firstly, in a large kadai heat 2 tbsp ghee and 2 tbsp oil. 6. Add 1 onion and fry until the onions turn golden brown. 7. Add 1 capsicum and fry until the capsicum turns crunchy. 8. Furthermore, add the prepared marination mixture and mix well. 9. Cover and cook for 10 minutes, or until the vegetables are cooked almost. Keep aside. 10. How to cook rice for biryani: 11. Firstly, rinse and soak 2 cup basmati rice for 30 minutes. 12. Now in a large vessel take enough water. 13. Add mixed spices, 3 chilli, 2 tbsp coriander, 2 tbsp salt, 2 tsp lemon juice and 1 tsp ghee. 14. Boil for 5 minutes, or until the water turns flavourful. 15. Now add in soaked basmati rice and mix gently. 16. Boil for 5. minutes, or until the rice is 80% cooked. 17. Further, drain off the rice, and the rice is ready for layering in the biryani. 18. Firstly, spread out the biyani gravy base onto the kadai. Top with fried onion, coriander, and mint. 19. Further top with cooked rice and level out uniformly. 20. Also top with fried onion, coriander, and mint. 21. Pour ½ cup saffron milk, 1 tsp biryani masala and 2 tsp ghee. 22. Cover and seal using almunium foil. 23. Simmer for 20 minutes, or until the rice is cooked well. make sure to rest for at least 30 minutes, before serving the veg dum biryani. 24. Finally, enjoy Veg Dum Biryani with salan and raita.

title: Veg Egg Curry Recipe | Eggless Veg Anda Curry with Aloo Paneer
ingredients: 1 cup paneer, 0.25 tsp salt, 0.25 tsp turmeric, 2 potato, 0.5 cup paneer, 2 tbsp corn flour, 0.5 tsp salt, oil, 2 tbsp oil, 1 inch ginger, 5 cloves garlic, 1 onion, 3 tomato, 2 tbsp oil, 1 bay leaf, 1 inch cinnamon, 1 tsp cumin, 0.5 onion, 0.25 tsp turmeric, 1 tsp chilli powder, 0.5 tsp coriander powder, 0.5 tsp cumin powder, 0.5 tsp garam masala, 1 tsp salt, 0.5 cup curd, 1 cup water, 1 tsp kasuri methi, 2 tbsp coriander
instructions: 1. firstly, in bowl take 1 cup paneer, ¼ tsp salt and ¼ tsp turmeric. 2. mix well making sure everything is well combined. 3. grease hand with oil and prepare small ball-sized yolk. keep aside. 4. to prepare outer white layer of egg, in a large bowl take 2 potato, ½ cup paneer, 2 tbsp corn flour and ½ tsp salt. 5. mix well making sure everything is well combined forming a dough. 6. grease hand with oil and pinch a ball sized mixture. 7. roll and flatten slightly, place a small ball sized prepared yolk. 8. stuff in and prepare a egg shaped kofta. 9. fry in hot oil, keeping the flame on medium. 10. make sure to stir and fry on medium flame until it turns golden brown. 11. drain off the egg shaped kofta and keep aside. 12. firstly, in a pan heat 2 tbsp oil. add 1 inch ginger, 5 cloves garlic, and 1 onion. 13. saute until onions turn golden brown. 14. add 3 tomato and saute until tomato turns soft and mushy. 15. cool completely, and grind to a smooth paste. keep aside. 16. in a large kadai heat 2 tbsp oil. add 1 bay leaf, 1 inch cinnamon and 1 tsp cumin. saute until the spices turn aromatic. 17. now add ½ onion and saute until the onions turn golden brown. 18. keeping the flame on low, add ¼ tsp turmeric, 1 tsp chilli powder, ½ tsp coriander powder, ½ tsp cumin powder, ½ tsp garam masala and 1 tsp salt. 19. saute until the spices turn aromatic. 20. further add prepared onion tomato paste and cook well. 21. cook until the oil separates from the base. 22. keeping the flame on low, add ½ cup curd and cook well. 23. keep cooking until the oil starts to release out. 24. add 1 cup water and mix well adjusting the consistency. 25. cover and boil for 5 minutes or until everything is well combined. 26. now add fried eggless egg kofta and dip in gravy. 27. cover and simmer for 2 minutes. 28. now add 1 tsp kasuri methi and 2 tbsp coriander. mix well. 29. finally, enjoy veg egg curry with roti or rice.

title: Veg Frankie Recipe | Veg Kathi Roll Recipe | Veg Frankie Roll Recipe
ingredients: 2 cup maida, 0.5 cup wheat flour, 0.5 tsp salt, 0.25 cup curd, water, oil, 2 tbsp oil, 1 tsp cumin, pinch hing, 2 chilli, 2 cloves garlic, 0.5 tsp ginger paste, 0.5 tsp turmeric, 1 tsp chilli powder, 0.5 tsp coriander powder, 0.5 tsp cumin powder, 0.5 tsp aamchur, 2 tbsp chilli sauce, 2 tbsp tomato sauce, 3 potato, 0.5 tsp salt, 2 tbsp coriander, 2 tsp lemon juice, oil, 3 tbsp vinegar, 2 chilli, 0.25 tsp salt, green chutney, coriander, chaat masala, onion, tomato sauce
instructions: 1. Firstly, in a large bowl take 2 cup maida, ½ cup wheat flour, ½ tsp salt and ¼ cup curd. 2. Mix well making sure everything is well combined. 3. Now add water as required and knead to smooth and soft dough. 4. Grease the dough with oil, cover and rest for 20 minutes. 5. After the dough has rested well, knead the dough again and pinch a ball-sized dough. 6. Dust with maida and roll thin. 7. Now cook the roti on hot pan spreading oil. 8. Flip over and cook both sides. 9. Also, spread the oil and cook until the roti is cooked from both sides. Keep aside. 10. Firstly, in a pan heat 2 tbsp oil. add 1 tsp cumin, pinch hing, 2 chilli, 2 cloves garlic and ½ tsp ginger paste. Saute well until the raw aroma goes off. 11. Keeping the flame on low, add ½ tsp turmeric, 1 tsp chilli powder, ½ tsp coriander powder, ½ tsp cumin powder, ½ tsp aamchur, 2 tbsp chilli sauce and 2 tbsp tomato sauce. 12. Saute on low flame until the spices are well combined. 13. Now add 3 potato, ½ tsp salt and mix well. 14. Mix until the spices are well combined. 15. Now add 2 tbsp coriander, 2 tsp lemon juice and mix well. 16. Once the mixture is cooled slightly, shape the tikki. 17. Roast on hot pan adding oil as required. 18. Roast both the sides until the tikki turns golden brown and crispy. Keep aside. 19. In a small bowl take 3 tbsp vinegar, 2 chilli and ¼ tsp salt. 20. Mix well, and chilli vinegar is ready to use. 21. Firstly, take roti and spread green chutney. 22. Place the prepared aloo tikki, and top with coriander, chaat masala, onion, chilli vinegar and tomato sauce. 23. Roll tight and wrap in butter paper. 24. Finally, Veg Frankie Recipe is ready to enjoy with tomato sauce.

title: veg frankie roll recipe | veg cheese frankie | veg cheese kathi roll
ingredients: 2 tsp oil, 0.5 onion, 0.5 capsicum, 2 medium potato, 3 tbsp peri peri sauce chilli sauce, salt to taste, 2 tsp butter, 3 chapati wrap, 3 tsp mayonnaise, 1 cup cabbage, 6 tbsp cheddar mozzarella cheese
instructions: 1. firstly, prepare the stuffing by heating oil. 2. saute ½ onion till they turn translucent. 3. also saute ½ capsicum for a minute or two. 4. additionally, add 2 boiled and mashed potato and saute for a minute. 5. furthermore, add 3 tbsp peri peri sauce / chilli sauce and salt to taste. 6. mix well and stuffing is ready. keep aside. 7. now heat tawa and warm up leftover chapati or wrap with some butter. 8. further spread a tsp of mayonnaise (homemade / store-brought) 9. also spread 2 tbsp of prepared stuffing. 10. top with few shredded cabbage and grated cheese. 11. roll tight making sure the stuffing doesn't come out. 12. also wrap with a aluminum foil to get a street side feel. 13. finally, serve veg cheese frankie or pack to your lunch box.

title: Veg Fried Rice Recipe (Vegetable Fried Rice)
ingredients: 1 cup Rice, 1 tablespoon Garlic, 2 tablespoons oil, 1 tablespoon Soya sauce, 1 teaspoon Vinegar, Salt, 0.5 teaspoon Black pepper, 0.375 cup Carrots, 0.25 cup Bell peppers chopped finely, 0.25 cup French beans, 0.25 cup Green onions, 0.25 cup Cabbage, 1 green chili
instructions: 1. Soak 1 cup rice for 10 to 20 mins. If you are a large family you can make make more rice (upto 3 cups) following the same method. Add rice to a large bowl. This is the kind of basmati rice I use. You can also use any long grain or medium grain like Jasmine rice or sona masuri. 2. Rinse the rice very well at least thrice to get rid of the starch. Any excess starch is going to make the rice sticky and gluey. If using aged basmati rice, I prefer to soak for at least 10 to 20 mins. This prevents the grains from turning hard and dry after stir frying in the wok. 3. Meanwhile pour 4 to 5 cups of water to a large pot and bring it to a rolling boil on a medium high flame. When the water begins to boil, drain the rice. 4. Add it to the boiling water. Also add 1 teaspoon oil to the water. Continue to cook on a medium high heat. 5. Keep checking so you don’t overcook. This only takes a few minutes. Cook the rice al dente and not mushy. Grains must be separated yet fully cooked. This is how they look when perfectly done. 6. Quickly drain the rice to a colander. Cool it until all of the steam vanishes. Fluff it up with a fork. If the rice is perfectly al dente, you can cover and set aside. This prevents the rice from drying & becoming hard. 7. Troubleshooting : If you feel your rice is on the softer side & slightly over cooked, sprinkle 1 tablespoon oil on the hot rice and spread it. Cool it without covering.

title: Veg Fried Rice Recipe | Chinese Vegetable Fried Rice
ingredients: 1 cup basmati rice, 1 tsp oil, 0.5 tsp salt, water for soaking boiling, 2 tbsp oil, 2 clove garlic, 0.5 onion, 4 tbsp spring onion, 0.25 carrot, 2 tbsp cabbage, 2 tbsp peas matar, 5 beans, 0.25 capsicum, 0.75 tsp salt, 2 tbsp soy sauce, 1 tbsp vinegar, 1 tsp pepper, 0.25 tsp salt
instructions: 1. firstly, in a large kadai heat 2 tbsp oil and stir-fry 2 clove garlic. 2. also, saute ½ onion and 2 tbsp spring onion until they sweat. 3. furthermore add vegetables of your choice like ¼ carrot, 2 tbsp cabbage, 2 tbsp peas, 5 beans, ¼ capsicum and ½ tsp salt. 4. stir fry on high flame without overcooking vegetables. 5. now add 2 tbsp soy sauce and 1 tbsp vinegar. stir-fry until the sauce is combined well. 6. keeping the flame on high, add cooked rice. 7. also, add 1 tsp pepper and ¼ tsp salt. adjust the salt as soy sauce has salt. 8. stir-fry by mixing well making sure rice grains won't break. 9. further, add 2 tbsp spring onions and mix well. 10. finally, enjoy veg fried rice with gobi manchurian.

title: Veg Jaipuri Recipe | Jaipuri Vegetable Curry - Hotel Style
ingredients: 2 tbsp oil, 0.5 carrot, 0.5 potato, 5 beans, 0.5 cup cabbage, 1 mushroom, 1 tsp salt, 2 tbsp oil, 1 tsp cumin, 2 cloves garlic, 1 inch ginger, 1 chilli, 1 onion, 0.5 tsp turmeric, 1 tbsp chilli powder, 1 tsp coriander powder, 1 tsp garam masala, 0.5 tsp cumin powder, 1 cup tomato cashew paste, 1 tsp salt, 0.5 cup paneer, 1 cup water, 2 tbsp cream, 2 papad
instructions: 1. Firstly, in a pan heat 2 tbsp oil. Add ½ carrot, ½ potato and saute for 2 minutes. 2. Also add 5 beans, ½ cup cabbage, 10 mushroom and 1 tsp salt. 3. Stir fry till the vegetables turn crunchy. Keep aside. 4. In a large wok heat 2 tbsp oil add 1 tsp cumin, 2 cloves garlic, 1 inch ginger, 1 chilli and saute well. 5. Also add 1 onion and saute till the onions turn golden brown. 6. Further add ½ tsp turmeric, 1 tbsp chilli powder, 1 tsp coriander powder, 1 tsp garam masala, ½ tsp cumin powder and saute till the spices turn aromatic. 7. Now add 1 cup tomato & cashew paste, 1 tsp salt and saute well. To prepare tomato cashew paste, grind 2 large tomato with 2 tbsp of cashew. 8. Cook till the oil separates. 9. Further add stir fried vegetables, ½ cup paneer and mix well. 10. Add in 1 cup water and mix well adjusting the consistency as required. 11. Now add 2 tbsp cream and cook till the oil separates. 12. Crush the papad and mix gently. 13. Finally, enjoy Veg Jaipuri Recipe topped with more papad.

title: Veg Kadai Recipe | Kadai Vegetable Sabzi with Special Masala
ingredients: 2 tbsp coriander seeds, 1 tbsp cumin, 1 tsp pepper, 5 red chilli, 2 tbsp oil, 1 tbsp ghee, 1 tsp cumin, pinch hing, 1 inch ginger, 5 cloves garlic, 2 onion, 0.5 tsp turmeric, 1 tsp chilli powder, 2 tsp kadai masala, 1.5 cup tomato puree, 0.5 cup water, 0.5 tsp sugar, 2 tbsp coriander, 2 tbsp kasuri methi, 2 tbsp oil, 1 potato, 1 caarrot, 3 tbsp peas, 5 beans, 0.5 capsicum, 0.5 onion, 1 tomato, 2 tbsp corn, 2 cubes paneer, 1 tsp salt
instructions: 1. Firstly, to prepare the kadai masala, in a pan, take 2 tbsp coriander seeds, 1 tbsp cumin, 1 tsp pepper and 5 dried red chilli. 2. Roast on a low flame till the spices turn aromatic. 3. Cool completely, and grind to a coarse powder. Kadai masala is ready. Keep aside. 4. In a large kadai, heat 2 tbsp oil and 1 tbsp ghee. 5. Add 1 tsp cumin and a pinch of hing. 6. Also, add 1 inch of ginger, 5 cloves of garlic and 2 onions. 7. Sauté till the onions turn golden brown. 8. Keeping the flame on low, add ½ tsp turmeric, 1 tsp chilli powder, 2 tsp prepared kadai masala. 9. Sauté till the spices turn aromatic. 10. Now add 1½ cups of tomato puree and cook until the oil separates. 11. In another pan, heat 2 tbsp oil. Add 1 potato and 1 carrot. Saute well. 12. Also, add 3 tbsp peas, 5 beans, ½ capsicum, ½ onion, 1 tomato, 2 tbsp corn, 20 cubes paneer and 1 tsp salt. 13. Stir-fry till the vegetables are almost cooked. 14. Transfer the roasted vegetables into the sabji base. 15. Add ½ cup water and ½ tsp sugar. 16. Mix well, ensuring the gravy is semi-thick. 17. Simmer for 5 minutes, or until the flavours are well absorbed. 18. Add in 2 tbsp coriander, 2 tbsp kasuri methi and mix well. 19. Finally, enjoy Mix Veg Kadai Recipe with roti.

title: Veg Kebab Recipe | Street Style Vegetable Kabab
ingredients: 2 tbsp oil, 1 tsp cumin, 5 cloves garlic, 2 chilli, 1 onion, 0.5 tsp ginger paste, 0.5 carrot, 5 beans, 2 tbsp sweet corn, 4 florets cauliflower, 0.5 capsicum, 3 potato, 0.5 tsp chilli powder, 0.5 tsp cumin powder, 0.5 tsp garam masala, 0.25 tsp kala namak, 1 tsp salt, 0.5 cup paneer, 2 tbsp coriander, 2 tbsp corn flour, breadcrumbs, oil, 0.5 cup maida, 0.5 cup corn flour, 0.5 tsp salt, 0.5 cup water
instructions: 1. Firstly, in a pan, heat 2 tbsp oil and saute 1 tsp cumin. 2. Add 5 cloves garlic, 2 chilli, 1 onion, ½ tsp ginger paste and saute well. 3. Also add ½ carrot, 5 beans, 2 tbsp sweet corn, 4 florets of cauliflower, ½ capsicum. 4. Sauté till the vegetables are cooked well. 5. Transfer to the large plate and allow to cool completely. 6. Now add 3 boiled and mashed potatoes. 7. Also add ½ tsp chilli powder, ½ tsp cumin powder, ½ tsp garam masala, ¼ tsp kala namak, 1 tsp salt, ½ cup paneer and 2 tbsp coriander. 8. Mix well, making sure everything is well combined. 9. To absorb excess moisture, add 2 tbsp corn flour and mix well. 10. Now prepare tikki and keep aside. 11. To prepare the slurry, in a bowl, take ½ cup maida, ½ cup corn flour, ½ tsp salt and ½ cup water. 12. Mix well, making sure there are no lumps. 13. Dip the kebab into the slurry and coat with breadcrumbs. 14. Shallow fry in hot oil, keeping the flame on medium. 15. Fry both sides till they turn golden and crispy. 16. Drain off to remove excess oil. 17. Finally, enjoy Mix Veg Kebab Recipe with green chutney and sauce.

title: Veg Kurma Recipe (Vegetable Korma Recipe)
ingredients: 0.25 cup coconut, 12 cashew nuts, 1 teaspoon fennel seeds, 1 tablespoon roasted chana dal, 6 tablespoons water, 1 bay leaf, 1 star anise, 1 strand mace, 0.5 teaspoon cumin, 2 green cardamoms, 3 cloves 3 cloves ((laung)), 1 inch cinnamon, 2 tablespoon oil, 1 cup onions, 1 green chilli, 0.875 tablespoon ginger garlic paste, 0.75 cup tomatoes, 0.875 teaspoon salt, 0.75 cup beans chopped to inch pieces, 0.75 cup carrot chopped to inch pieces, 0.875 cup cauliflower, 1 cup potatoes chopped to inch, 0.75 cup green peas, 1.75 cups water, 2 tablespoons coriander leaves, 0.25 teaspoon turmeric, 1 teaspoon red chili powder, 1.25 teaspoon garam masala
instructions: 1. Fine chop onions & tomatoes. Slit chilli and set aside all of these. Cube the veggies to ½ inch sizes and set aside. Keep the potatoes immersed in a bowl of water until used. 2. Make a fine paste of coconut, cashews, roasted chana dal & saunf with 6 tbsps water. If you do not like the flavor of fennel seeds you may skip it. Set aside the kurma paste. 3. Heat a pot with oil. Then saute bay leaf, star anise, mace, jeera, cardamoms, cloves and cinnamon until they sizzle. 4. Next put in the chopped onions and green chili. Fry until they turn transparent & pink in color. 5. Fry ginger garlic paste until the raw smell goes off. 6. Next saute tomatoes with salt until mushy and soft. 7. Add turmeric, chilli powder, garam masala and coriander leaves. Saute well for 2 to 3 mins until the masala smells really good. 8. Transfer the coconut paste and saute for few minutes until the kurma masala smells good. 9. Drain the water from potatoes and add them to the pot. 10. Next add the other veggies and mix well. Fry for 2 to 3 minutes and then pour water just enough to cover the veggies. Adjust salt if needed. 11. Cook until the veggies are cooked. Garnish with coriander leaves. 12. Serve veg kurma with chapati, pulao or biryani. 13. Press SAUTE button and pour oil to the inner pot of Instant pot. Add all the whole spices and saute for 30 seconds. 14. Next add onions and chili. saute for 3 mins. 15. Add ginger garlic and saute for 30 seconds. 16. Next add tomatoes and salt. Saute for 1 minute. 17. Move the onions and tomatoes to one side. Add the potatoes to the other side. 18. Cover with an external lid and cook for 1 to 2 minutes. 19. Saute all of these for 1 to 2 minutes. 20. Add in all the spice powder and saute for 30 to 60 seconds. 21. Press CANCEL button and add the coconut paste. 22. Add the rest of the veggies and mix well. 23. Pour water and deglaze the bottom by scrubbing with a spatula. This releases bits of food stuck there & avoids a burn. 24. Taste the water and add more salt if needed. 25. Secure the Instant pot with the lid and position the steam release handle/ value to sealing. 26. Press PRESSURE COOK button (high pressure) and set the timer to 1 minute. 27. After the Instant pot beeps, wait for 1 minute. Then release the pressure manually by moving the steam release value from sealing to venting. 28. Give a gentle stir. Vegetable korma will look runny at this stage but will thicken after it cools down a bit.

title: veg lollipop recipe | vegetable lollipop | veg lollipop sticks
ingredients: 3 potato, 0.5 onion, 3 tbsp capsicum, 0.5 carrot, 2 tbsp peas, 3 tbsp sweet corn, 2 clove garlic, 0.5 tsp mixed herbs, 0.25 tsp pepper powder, 0.5 tsp chilli powder, 0.5 tsp cumin powder, 0.5 tsp garam masala, 0.5 tsp salt, 3 tbsp spring onion, 0.25 cup breadcrumbs, 0.75 cup maida, 0.25 cup corn flour, 0.25 tsp pepper powder, 0.5 tsp salt, 2 clove garlic, 0.5 cup water, 1 cup panko breadcrumbs, oil, 0.5 cup eggless mayonnaise, 2 tbsp chilli sauce
instructions: 1. firstly, in a large bowl take 3 potato. make sure to boil the potato and cool it completely before using it. 2. also add ½ onion, 3 tbsp capsicum, ½ carrot, 3 tbsp sweet corn and 2 clove garlic. 3. further add ½ tsp mixed herbs, ¼ tsp pepper powder, ½ tsp chilli powder, ½ tsp cumin powder, ½ tsp garam masala and ½ tsp salt. 4. add 3 tbsp spring onion, ¼ cup breadcrumbs and mix well. breadcrumbs help to absorb the moisture and prevent it from breaking while frying. 5. form a soft dough adding breadcrumbs if required. 6. now pinch a ball sized dough and roll uniformly. keep aside. 7. to prepare the slurry, in a bowl take ¾ cup maida, ¼ cup cornflour, ¼ tsp pepper powder, ½ tsp salt and 2 clove garlic. 8. add ½ cup water and mix well forming a smooth slurry. 9. now dip the veg ball in slurry and roll in breadcrumbs. 10. deep fry in hot oil, keeping the flame on medium. 11. fry until the ball turns golden brown and crispy. 12. drain off to remove excess oil. 13. to prepare chilli mayo sauce, in a bowl take ½ cup eggless mayonnaise and 2 tbsp chilli sauce. 14. mix well combining the sauce really well. 15. finally, prick the lollipop using a toothpick and enjoy with chilli mayo sauce.

title: Veg Manchurian Recipe with Manchurian Sauce
ingredients: 1.25 cup cabbage, 0.5 cup carrot, 0.25 cup French beans, 2 tablespoons capsicum, 0.25 cup spring onions, 3 tablespoons cornstarch, 3 tablespoons all-purpose flour, 0.375 cup bread crumbs, 0.375 teaspoon pepper, 1 teaspoon ginger garlic paste, 2 pinches salt, Oil, 1.5 tablespoons oil, 0.75 tablespoon garlic, 0.5 tablespoon ginger, 0.25 cup spring onions, 0.25 cup bell peppers finely chopped, 1 tablespoons soya sauce, 2 tablespoons red chili sauce, 1 tablespoon ketchup, 1 teaspoon vinegar, 0.75 tablespoon cornstarch, 0.25 cup water, 1 cup water, salt, 1.25 teaspoon sugar, 0.375 teaspoon pepper, 0.625 teaspoon red chili powder, 1.5 tablespoons water
instructions: 1. Allow the veggies to come to room temperature first. 2. Cut cabbage to 4 quarters and keep them immersed in luke warm water for 3 to 4 mins. 3. Drain the water and rinse them well. Drain and chop them finely. 4. Air dry the cabbage for a while to remove excess moisture. 5. You can also process all the veggies in a food processor. 6. Wash and peel the carrots and grate them. 7. Chop the beans, spring onions & bell peppers. Mince the ginger and garlic. 8. Add the prepared veggies, cornstarch, plain flour, ginger garlic paste, pepper & salt to a mixing bowl. Mix everything well. 9. You can also add bread crumbs to make the balls extra crisp. 10. Mix everything well and make lemon sized balls. The balls must bind well without breaking. 11. You can also optionally roll these balls in corn starch. 12. You can make about 12 to 14 balls. Set aside all the vegetable balls. 13. Frying balls - Heat oil in a deep pan for deep frying. 14. Check if the oil is hot enough by dropping a small portion of the dough in hot oil. 15. The dough has to come up without browning. This is the right temperature. 16. Gently slide the balls in hot oil & fry on a medium flame. 17. Do not disturb them for 1 min after the balls are dropped in oil. 18. They will be delicate and may break if you have not used bread crumbs. 19. After few seconds of frying, you can keep stirring and fry until they turn golden. 20. Drain them on a kitchen tissue. 21. Baking in Oven - Preheat the oven and bake the balls on a greased wire rack placed over a tray at 200 C for 20 to 23 mins. 22. Turn them to the other sides after every 8 mins. 23. Please be alert as the timings may vary depending on the size of the balls. 24. Heat oil in a pan, then add ginger garlic and saute for a min. 25. Add spring onions and capsicum. Saute for 1 to 2 mins on a high flame without burning. 26. While these fry dissolve cornstarch in water. 27. Lower the heat, then add soya sauce, red chilli sauce, tomato ketchup and red chilli paste. 28. Stir the cornstarch mixture with a spoon and pour it to the pan. 29. Next stir gently and pour water. Stir and taste the mixture. 30. Add vinegar, salt, pepper and sugar all to suit your taste. 31. The sauce should taste slightly sour, hot and sweet. 32. Keep stirring and cook on a medium flame until the sauce thickens. 33. Do not cook till very thick. The sauce will thicken further after cooling. 34. Switch off the stove and allow the sauce to cool for 1 to 2 mins. 35. Boiling hot sauce will make the veg balls soft and will lose the crispness. 36. Add the veg balls to the sauce just before serving. Garnish with spring onions. 37. Serve veg manchurian with veg fried rice or noodles.

title: Veg Momos Recipe | Momos Ki Recipe - Street Style
ingredients: 2 cup maida, 0.5 tsp salt, 1 tbsp oil, warm water, 2 tbsp oil, 5 cloves garlic, 1 inch ginger, 2 chilli, 2 tbsp spring onion, 0.5 onion, 2 cup cabbage, 1 carrot, 0.5 tsp salt, 0.5 tsp pepper powder, 2 tbsp spring onion
instructions: 1. Firstly, take 2 cups maida, ½ tsp salt, and 1 tbsp oil in a bowl. Mix well. 2. Add warm water and start to knead the dough. 3. Knead the dough to make it smooth and soft. Cover and keep aside. 4. To prepare the stuffing, heat 2 tablespoons oil. Add 5 cloves garlic, 1 inch ginger, 2 chillies, and 2 tbsp spring onion. Saute well. 5. Also, add ½ onion and sauté slightly. 6. Further add 2 cups of cabbage, 1 carrot, ½ tsp salt and ½ tsp pepper powder. 7. Stir fry till the vegetables making sure the vegetables are cooked. 8. Add 2 tbsp spring onion and mix well. Veg Momos Stuffing is ready, keep aside. 9. Knead the dough again and pinch a ball-sized dough. 10. Roll and flatten as thin as possible. Cut into a round shape. 11. Now place a tbsp of stuffing in the centre. 12. Start pleating the edges slowly and gather everything. 13. Press in the middle and seal the momos, forming a bundle. 14. Heat a steamer and arrange the momos in the tray without touching each other. 15. Furthermore, steam momos for 10-12 minutes or till a shiny sheen appears over them. 16. Finally, Veg Momos Recipe is ready to enjoy with momos chutney.

title: veg nizami handi recipe | how to make veg hyderabadi nizami handi
ingredients: 1 tsp butter, 2 tsp oil, 1 bay leaf, 3 pods cardamom, 1 inch cinnamon, 5 cloves 5 cloves, 2 tomato, 0.25 cup cashew, 2 clove garlic, 1 inch ginger, 0.5 tsp chilli powder, 0.5 tsp salt, 1 cup water, water, 1 tsp salt, 2 florets gobi cauliflower, 1 carrot, 1 beans, 0.5 cup peas, 1 cup palak spinach, 2 tbsp oil, 1 tbsp ghee, 1 bay leaf, 2 pods black cardamom, 1 inch cinnamon, 1 tsp cumin, 0.5 tsp ajwain carom seeds, 1 onion, 1 tsp ginger garlic paste, 0.5 tsp turmeric, 1 tsp chilli powder, 1 tsp coriander powder, 0.5 tsp cumin powder, 1 tomato, 1 tsp salt, 1 cup water, 1 chilli, 15 cubes paneer, 0.25 cup cream, 1 tsp sugar, 1 tsp kasuri methi, 0.25 tsp garam masala, 2 tbsp coriander
instructions: 1. firstly, in pan heat 1 tsp butter and 2 tsp oil. 2. add 1 bay leaf, 3 pods cardamom, 1 inch cinnamon and 5 cloves. saute until the spices turn aromatic. 3. now add 2 tomato, ¼ cup cashew, 2 clove garlic, 1 inch ginger, ½ tsp chilli powder and ½ tsp salt. 4. saute for a minute or until the tomato shrinks slightly. 5. further add 1 cup water, cover and boil for 5 minutes or until tomatoes are cooked well. 6. cool completely, and blend to smooth paste. keep aside. 7. firstly, in a large vessel take hot water, add 1 tsp salt and get to a boil. 8. add 20 florets gobi, 1 carrot and boil for 2 minutes. 9. now add 10 beans, ½ cup peas and 1 cup palak. 10. stir and get to a boil. do not over the vegetables as they turn mushy. 11. drain off the vegetables and keep them aside. you can use leftover water as veg stock to prepare soup or use to knead the dough. 12. firstly, in a large kadai heat 2 tbsp oil and 1 tbsp ghee. 13. add 1 bay leaf, 2 pods black cardamom, 1 inch cinnamon, 1 tsp cumin and ½ tsp ajwain. 14. saute until the spices turn aromatic. 15. now add 1 onion, 1 tsp ginger garlic paste and saute until the onions turn golden brown. 16. further add ½ tsp turmeric, 1 tsp chilli powder, 1 tsp coriander powder, ½ tsp cumin powder. saute until the spices turn aromatic. 17. add 1 tomato and saute until the tomato turns soft and mushy. 18. additionally, add prepared makhani gravy and 1 tsp salt. 19. stir and cook until the oil separates from the gravy. 20. now add boiled vegetables and mix coating the gravy well. 21. further, add 1 cup water and 1 chilli. mix well adjusting the consistency as required. 22. also, add 15 cubes of paneer and ¼ cup cream. mix well combing everything well. 23. cover and simmer for 5 minutes, or until the flavours are absorbed well. 24. now add 1 tsp sugar, 1 tsp kasuri methi, ¼ tsp garam masala and 2 tbsp coriander. mix well. 25. finally, enjoy nizami handi with roti or naan.

title: Veg Noodles Recipe (Vegetable Noodles)
ingredients: 5 oz noodles, 0.25 teaspoon salt, 2.5 tablespoons peanut oil, 1 tablespoon garlic, 1.5 green chili, 1 onion, 3 cups mixed veggies julienned, 0.5 teaspoon black pepper, 1 tablespoon soya sauce, 1 tablespoon vegetarian mushroom sauce, 1 teaspoon rice vinegar, 1.5 teaspoon sauce, 3 tablespoon green onions
instructions: 1. Bring 5 cups water to a rolling boil. Add the noodles and cook al dente on a medium high heat. They should be cooked just until done & not overcooked. Follow the instructions on the pack for cook time. 2. Drain them to a colander. Rinse them well under running cold water. Sprinkle 1 tsp oil and spread it all over the noodles. This prevents them from drying out and becoming lumpy. Set aside. 3. While the noodles cook, prepare the veggies & garlic. 4. Rinse all the vegetables under running water. Peel the carrots and julienne all the vegetables as thin as possible (refer step by step pictures) 5. To a small bowl, add all the sauces you prefer to use along with your choice of vinegar. 6. Pour oil to a hot wok and spread the oil all over the wok. Regulate the flame to medium high. 7. Add garlic and green chilies. Stir fry for 30 seconds and add onions (optional). 8. Fry them for a minute only we don't want soft onions. Add all the veggies - carrots, bell pepper, green beans & cabbage. 9. Toss & stir fry on the highest flame/heat for 2 to 3 mins until they are half done yet crunchy. Do not over cook the veggies. 10. Add cooked noodles and black pepper. Pour the prepared sauce around the sides of the wok/pan. 11. Toss and stir fry for 2 mins. Taste test and add more salt or sauce to taste if want. Serve veg noodles hot or warm.

title: Veg Noodles Recipe | Vegetable Noodles - Tips for Non Sticky
ingredients: 2 hakka noodles, water, 2 tsp oil, 2 tbsp oil, 4 cloves garlic, 1 inch gigner, 2 chilli, 0.5 onion, 0.5 carrot, 0.5 cup cabbage, 5 beans, 0.5 capsicum, 0.5 tsp salt, 2 tsp chilli sauce, 2 tsp tomato sauce, 2 tsp schezwan sauce, 2 tsp vinegar, 2 tsp soy sauce, 0.5 tsp pepper powder, spring onion
instructions: 1. Firstly, in a bowl take 2 hakka noodles and soak in hot water for 5 minutes. Make sure to check the package instructions to know the cooking time. 2. Drain off the noodles and rinse with cold water. 3. Spread in a plate and coat with 2 tsp oil. Keep aside. 4. In a wok heat 2 tbsp oil. Stir fry 4 cloves of garlic, 1 inch of ginger and 2 chillies. 5. Stir-fry ½ onion on a high flame. 6. Now add ½ carrot, ½ cup cabbage, 5 beans, ½ capsicum and ½ tsp salt. 7. Stir-fry till the vegetables turn crunchy. 8. Now add in boiled noodles, 2 tsp chilli sauce, 2 tsp tomato sauce, 2 tsp schezwan sauce, 2 tsp vinegar, 2 tsp soy sauce and ½ tsp pepper powder. 9. Stir-fry till the sauces are well-coated with the noodles. 10. Finally, add spring onion and enjoy Veg Noodles Recipe.

title: Veg Puff Recipe (Bakery Vegetable Puffs)
ingredients: 1 puff pastry sheet, 1 tablespoon oil, 0.5 teaspoon crushed fennel seeds, 1 onion, 1 sprig curry leaves, 1 green chili, 1 teaspoon ginger garlic paste, 0.375 teaspoon Kashmiri red chili powder, 0.25 teaspoon turmeric, 0.5 teaspoon garam masala, 0.5 teaspoon sea salt, 1 teaspoon lemon juice, 1 tablespoon coriander leaves, 1 cup diced potato, 0.5 cup diced carrots, 0.5 cup green peas, 2 tablespoons unsalted melted butter
instructions: 1. Place diced potatoes, carrots & peas in a steaming basket or a wide bowl. Steam in a pot or pressure cooker until cooked through. I use my instant pot to steam on high pressure for 6 mins. 2. Heat a pan with oil and add the fennel seeds. When they begin to sizzle add onions, curry leaves, green chilies and half of the salt. Saute until light golden for 4 mins. 3. Add ginger garlic and fry for a minute. Reduce the flame and stir in chili powder, turmeric, garam masala and remaining salt. 4. Pour 2 to 3 tablespoon of water and deglaze the pan. Stir in the steamed veggies & saute for 2 mins. Turn off. 5. Mix in coriander leaves and lemon juice if you want. Taste test to adjust salt. Cool down completely. If you want may remove the curry leaves & discard. 6. Meanwhile thaw your puff pastry sheets at room temperature, until easy enough to handle. Mine takes only 5 to 6 mins. (Depends on your indoor temp) 7. Cut each pastry sheet to 4 portions. Place 3 to 4 tbsps vegetable stuffing in the center of each cut puff pastry. (don't overfill) Brush 2 parallel edges with little water. 8. Bring one edge over the other and gently tap with your fingers, don’t press down with pressure. I prefer to leave a little gap on the sides for the steam to escape. This keeps the puffs crispy slightly longer. 9. Brush with unsalted melted butter or milk and place in the refrigerator for 15 to 20 mins. Meanwhile preheat the oven to 400 F/ 200 C for 15 to 20 mins. 10. Place in the center and bake for 20 to 22 mins or as instructed on the package, until golden & flaky. (Smaller ovens and toasters may take only 15 mins) 11. Cool the tray on a wired rack for at least 5 mins. Serve Vegetable puffs hot or warm with ketchup, cilantro/coriander chutney & chai.

title: Veg Pulao Recipe | Simple & Easy Vegetable Pulav
ingredients: 0.5 cup coriander, 0.25 cup mint pudina, 1 inch ginger, 2 clove garlic, 2 chilli, 2 pod cardamom, 1 inch cinnamon, 5 cloves 5 cloves, 1 tsp fennel saunf, 0.25 cup water, 2 tbsp ghee clarified butter, 1 tsp cumin, 1 bay leaf, 1 inch cinnamon, 2 pod cardamom, 3 cloves 3 cloves, 0.5 tsp pepper, 5 cashew, 0.5 onion, 1 tomato, 5 beans, 0.5 capsicum, 2 tbsp peas, 0.5 carrot, 0.5 potato, 1 tsp salt, 2 cup water, 1 cup basmati rice, 1 cup curd, 1 cup water, 0.5 onion, 0.5 tomato, 0.5 cucumber, 2 tbsp coriander, 0.5 tsp roasted cumin powder, 0.25 tsp salt
instructions: 1. firstly, in a small mixi take ½ cup coriander, ¼ cup mint, 1 inch ginger, 2 clove garlic, 2 chilli, 2 pod cardamom, 1 inch cinnamon, 5 cloves and 1 tsp fennel. 2. add ¼ cup water and blend smooth paste. keep aside. 3. ina large kadai, heat 2 tbsp ghee. add 1 tsp cumin, 1 bay leaf, 1 inch cinnamon, 2 pod cardamom, 3 cloves, ½ tsp pepper and 5 cashew. 4. saute on low flame until the spices turn aromatic. 5. now add ½ onion and saute until the colour changes slightly. 6. further, add 1 tomato and saute until the tomatoes turn soft and mushy. 7. additionally, add 5 beans, ½ capsicum, 2 tbsp peas, ½ carrot and ½ potato. 8. saute for a minute until the vegetables turn aromatic. 9. now add prepared coriander pudina masala paste and 1 tsp salt. mix well. 10. further, add 2 cup water and stir well getting to a boil. 11. once the water comes to a rolling boil, add 1 cup basmati rice. make sure to soak basmati rice for 20 minutes. 12. mix well, cover and simmer for 20 minutes. 13. after 20 minutes, veg pulao is ready to serve. 14. firstly, in a large bowl, take 1 cup curd and whisk with 1 cup water. 15. add ½ onion, ½ tomato, ½ cucumber, 2 tbsp coriander, ½ tsp roasted cumin powder and ¼ tsp salt. mix well. 16. finally, onion tomato raita is ready to enjoy with mix veg pulao.

title: Veg roll recipe (chapati roll)
ingredients: 1 cup atta, salt, 1 tsp oil, 0.3333333333333333 water, 1.5 tbsp olive oil, 1.5 garlic cloves, 2.5 cups cabbage, 1 cup carrots, 1 cup bell peppers, 1 chili, 0.25 tsp pepper, salt, 0.5 tsp vinegar, 1 tsp soya sauce, salt, Garlic sauce
instructions: 1. Add flour, oil and salt to a mixing bowl. Make a soft dough using water as needed. Knead it very well until soft and pliable. Set this aside until the stuffing is ready. 2. Once the stuffing is done, set aside to cool and begin to make the rotis. 3. Divide the sough to 4 to 5 equal parts. 4. Dust the rolling area with some atta. Place a ball of dough. sprinkle some flour on it as well and flatten it. 5. Roll the dough evenly to make a round roti, sprinkling more flour if needed. 6. Heat a griddle or tawa until hot enough on a medium high heat. Transfer the roti to the griddle and begin to toast it. 7. When you see bubbles over the roti, flip it to the other side and press gently with a spatula which helps the roti to puff up well. 8. Cook on both the sides until golden to brown spots appear. Stack these in a plate lined with cloth or kitchen tissues. Cool these. Then proceed further to make the rolls. 9. Heat oil in a pan, saute garlic and chill until aromatic. 10. Add the veggies and saute on a very high flame until they are partially cooked. 11. Add pepper , sauce and vinegar. Sprinkle salt. 12. Mix and saute until the sauce evaporates. Cool this completely 13. Smear olive oil thinly all over the roti. Then spread your favorite sauce over the roti including the edges. 14. Place the fried veggies to one edge and fold both the edges to seal. 15. Begin to roll tightly to make a roll. 16. Halve veg rolls and roll in butter paper.

title: veg roll tikki recipe | veg pinwheel tikki | veg tikki roll
ingredients: 2 cup wheat flour atta, 1 tsp chilli flakes, 0.5 tsp salt, water, 2 tbsp oil, 2 potato aloo, 1 carrot, 0.5 capsicum, 5 tbsp cabbage, 0.5 onion, 2 tbsp coriander, 0.5 tsp chilli powder, 0.25 tsp pepper powder, 0.5 tsp chaat masala, 0.5 tsp cumin powder, 0.5 tsp salt, oil
instructions: 1. firstly, in a large bowl take 2 cup wheat flour, 1 tsp chilli flakes and ½ tsp salt. mix well. 2. add water as required and knead the dough. 3. also, add 2 tbsp oil and continue to knead. 4. knead to a smooth and soft dough. tuck the dough and grease with oil. 5. cover and rest for 20 minutes. 6. meanwhile, to prepare the stuffing, in a large bowl take 2 potatoes. 7. add 1 carrot, ½ capsicum, 5 tbsp cabbage, ½ onion and 2 tbsp coriander. 8. also add ½ tsp chilli powder, ¼ tsp pepper powder, ½ tsp chaat masala, ½ tsp cumin powder and ½ tsp salt. 9. mix well making sure all the ingredients are well combined. 10. after the dough has rested for 20 minutes, knead again. 11. pinch a ball sized dough and dust with wheat flour. 12. roll slightly thick, dusting with more atta if required. 13. now spread 3-4 tbsp of prepared mixture uniformly. 14. make sure to leave the sides. 15. roll tight making sure the mixture is intact. 16. now cut into 2-inch pieces and flatten slightly. 17. fry in hot oil keeping the flame on low. 18. make sure to fry on both sides by flipping in between. 19. fry until the tikki turns golden brown and crisp. drain off over kitchen paper. 20. finally, enjoy veg roll tikki with tomato sauce or green chutney.

title: Veg Sandwich Recipe | Cheese Vegetable Grill Sandwich on Tawa
ingredients: 2 tbsp carrot, 2 tbsp sweet corn, 2 tbsp capsicum, 2 tbsp tomato, 2 tbsp paneer, 2 tbsp boiled potato, 1 tsp schezwan chutney, 0.5 tsp salt, 0.5 tsp mixed herbs, 3 tbsp cheese, bread slices, butter, schezwan chutney
instructions: 1. Firstly, in a bowl take 2 tbsp carrot, 2 tbsp sweet corn, 2 tbsp capsicum, 2 tbsp tomato, 2 tbsp paneer, 2 tbsp boiled potato. 2. Add 1 tsp schezwan chutney, ½ tsp salt, ½ tsp mixed herbs, and 3 tbsp cheese. 3. Mix well making sure everything is well combined. 4. Now take 2 bread slices and spread butter. 5. Also, spread schezwan chutney over the bread. 6. Place cheese slices and stuff in the prepared stuffing. 7. Place another cheese slice and cover with the bread. 8. Toast on a pan by applying butter. 9. Flip over once the bottom is golden brown. 10. Now spread schezwan sauce, and top with stuffing and cheese. 11. Also, top with mixed herbs and chilli flakes. 12. Cover and cook until the cheese melts. 13. Finally, enjoy Veg Grilled Cheese Sandwich Recipe.

title: veg sandwich recipe | easy vegetable cheese sandwich recipe
ingredients: 4 bread slices, 2 tsp oil, 0.5 onion, 0.5 cup corn, 1 carrot, 0.5 capsicum, 1 bunch spinach palak leaves, 1 tsp crushed pepper, 0.5 tsp mixed herbs, salt to taste, 2 tbsp tomato sauce, 2 tbsp green chutney, 0.25 cup mozzarella, 2 tsp butter
instructions: 1. firstly, in a large kadai heat oil and fry onions. 2. further add corn, carrot and capsicum. fry for a minute till the veggies are half cooked yet crunchy. 3. now add chopped spinach and fry till they shrink in size. 4. also add pepper, mixed herbs and salt. give a good mix. 5. now take 2 breads and on one spread tomato sauce and green chutney on the other. 6. also place the prepared stuffing and spread uniformly on the bread slice. 7. further, grate the cheese over the stuffing. 8. cover with the other slice of bread and grill or toast on tawa. 9. spread butter on both the outer sides of bread to make sandwich more crispy and golden. 10. furthermore, close the griller and grill till the cheese melts and bread turn golden brown. 11. now cut the bread into half and serve. 12. finally, serve hot or pack for kids lunch box.

title: Veg Sandwich Recipe | Vegetable Sandwich
ingredients: 4 slices bread, 2 tsps butter, 1 tbsp oil, 0.5 tsp cumin, 1 tsp garlic, 1 pinch turmeric, salt, 2 green chilies, 1 cup mixed veggies, 1 tomato, 0.625 tsp garam masala, 2 tbsp coriander leaves
instructions: 1. Add oil to the pan, add cumin and allow to splutter. Saute garlic until a nice aroma comes. 2. Next add tomatoes and sprinkle salt. Cover and cook until soft and mushy. If using red chili powder add it now and saute for a minute. 3. Add the veggies and begin to saute on a medium to high flame until half done or soft cooked to suit your taste. You can also cover and cook until soft. 4. Next add masala powder and coriander leaves. Stir and saute for a minute. If needed add more salt. Set this aside. 5. For stove top grilling - Smear butter over the bread slices and toast them until golden on the outer side and until crisp on the inner side. Transfer the prepared veggies. If desired add cheese at this step. 6. Cover with another slice of bread and press down. If using cheese, turn on the flame to very low and heat until the cheese melts. Press down the bread with a wooden spoon. This helps the bread to stick to the stuffing. You can also grill this in a sandwich maker 7. For grilling in veg sandwich in toaster - Butter the bread slices on the outer side. On the inner side spread the veggie mix and cover with another slice. Grill it in a sandwich toaster until golden. 8. Serve veg sandwich hot.

title: Veg Seekh Kabab (Soya Kabab)
ingredients: 3 potatoes, 1.5 cups soya, 0.5 cup green peas, 1 tsp ginger garlic paste, Salt, 1 tsp coriander powder, 0.5 tsp garam masala, 0.625 tsp red chili powder, 0.5 tsp pepper, 0.25 tsp amchur, 2 tbsp roasted besan, 1.5 tbsp oil
instructions: 1. Boil or steam green peas and potatoes (sweet potatoes) just until done without turning them mushy. 2. Add soya to hot water and allow to soak until softened. Drain off and squeeze up excess frothy water. Rinse them twice more with cold water and squeeze off well to remove excess water. If using chunks you can pulse them in a mixer few times to make them coarse granules. 3. Dry roast the flour until it turns aromatic. 4. Mash the veggies and mix them with soya and ginger garlic paste. 5. Add rest of the ingredients except oil and mix well. The mixture must resemble a dough. If the dough is too sticky or crumbly or falling apart then add little more besan. 6. Divide the dough and make 9 equal portions. Roll them on skewers about 3 to 4 inches long. 7. Grease your grill pan and heat. Or preheat the oven to 220 C for about 15 mins. 8. Place them and grill. Rotate them every 5 to 7 minutes to the undone part. Grill until done or for about 30 mins. Do not flip them until they are cooked, else it will stick to the pan. When they are half done, place a slice of onion on the grill for smoky flavor. 9. When the kebabs are golden, increase the flame to maximum and grill for few minutes. If doing in oven move it to the top rack and grill for 5 mins. 10. Serve veg seekh kabab hot with mint chutney, onion and lemon wedges.

title: Veg Wraps
ingredients: 4 whole wheat roti, 1 carrot, 1 onion, 1 tomato, Lettuce, 1 green chili, 0.25 cup cream cheese, 1.5 garlic cloves, Lemon juice, Pepper powder, 0.375 tsp Mustard powder, Salt, 1.5 tbsp Olive oil
instructions: 1. Wash veggies thoroughly and prepare them. Slice onions and tomatoes, shred carrots and cabbage if using. You can also use spring onions and bell peppers. Mince garlic and chop chili if using. 2. You can also use lettuce or any other leafy greens you like. I have used butter lettuce here. I sprinkle vinegar and leave them for a while. Then rinse them well few times. Drain them completely. 3. If using green chutney, You can follow this link on how to make green chutney . Skip this one and the next 2 steps. Prepare the spread by adding cheese or yogurt or mayo to a bowl. Add mustard, pepper powder, mustard powder, chilies and garlic. 4. Add olive oil and Lemon juice. 5. Mix up everything. It must be of a spreading consistency. I prefer to add in more oil & lemon juice to bring it to a spreading consistency. It must be thick as well. 6. Smear the prepared spread over the roti including edges. If using green chutney, I smear some olive oil over the roti, this helps to keep the roti firm and prevents from turning soggy. Then apply green chutney as desired. Make sure you apply towards the edges if not using toothpicks to hold them. 7. Place the leafy greens first and then the shredded veggies. Begin to roll up from one side of the roti. 8. Roll it up & stick the edges. For the wrap to hold its shape make sure you smear the spread over the edges well. 9. Notes on Veg wrap recipe: If using cream cheese this has to be consumed within 2 hours otherwise refrigerated. If using hung curd or greek yogurt, it may turn sour if left for long hours. It keeps good for about 2 to 4 hours depending on the temperature. Make sure not to use sour curd and skip lemon juice if you intend to keep it for longer than an hour. If using mayo it is good to consume right away or atleast by 45 to 60 mins. If using green chutney, it can keep good for about 3 to 5 hours. I go with this option when I make this for the kids school box. 10. Wash and shred the veggies as desired. 11. Skip this step if using green chutney. Mix together cheese or yogurt or mayo with garlic, mustard, pepper and lemon juice. The spread is ready. 12. Spread the mix evenly over the roti, including the edges. 13. Serve within 2 hours if using mayo or cheese. If you have green chutney it stays good for several hours.

title: Vegetable Barley Soup Recipe
ingredients: 0.5 cup pearl barley, 0.875 tablespoon oil, 0.5 tablespoon ginger, 0.5 tablespoon garlic, 0.375 teaspoon red chilli flakes, 1 potato, 0.5 cup tomato puree, 0.875 tablespoon curry powder, 0.625 cup carrots, 0.25 cup green beans, 0.5 cup green peas, 0.25 cup sweet corn kernels, 0.875 teaspoon salt, 2.5 tablespoons coriander leaves, 5.5 cups water
instructions: 1. Add barley to a large pot and rinse very well a few times. Drain the water. If you want you can also soak it for 4 to 8 hours. Soaking helps barley cook faster and is great for digestion. 2. Pour oil to a pot and heat it. Add ginger and garlic. Saute for 30 to 60 seconds until aromatic. Then stir in the red chilli flakes. 3. Add barley, potatoes and pour water or broth. Simmer until barley is tender and soft. Soaked barley cooks under 20 minutes. Unsoaked grains take longer. 4. Next time to add in curry powder, tomato puree, carrot, peas, sweet corn and French beans. 5. Stir and continue to simmer until the vegetables become tender. 6. Add salt and taste test. If you want you can add more curry powder for flavor. Barley soup thickens upon cooling. If it is too thick for your liking pour more broth or water and simmer a little longer. 7. Stir in the fresh herbs - coriander or parsley. 8. Let cool down and serve barley soup. We prefer a dash of lemon juice and crushed black pepper. You may add them if you like.

title: vegetable chop recipe | veg chop recipe | bengali veg cutlet recipe
ingredients: 0.5 tsp cumin jeera, 0.5 tsp coriander seeds, 0.5 tsp fennel saunf, 1 pepper, 1 bay leaf tej patta, 2 cloves 2 cloves, 1 cardamom, 0.5 inch cinnamon, 1 red chilli, 2 tsp oil, 0.5 tsp ginger paste, 1 chilli, 0.5 tsp sugar, 0.25 tsp salt, 3 tbsp peanuts, 2 tbsp coriander, oil for deep frying, 3 tbsp maida plain flour, 3 tbsp corn flour, 0.25 tsp salt, 0.5 cup water, 1 cup breadcrumbs
instructions: 1. firstly steam the vegetables and mash smooth. 2. now in a large kadai heat 2 tsp oil and saute ½ tsp ginger paste and 1 chilli. 3. further, add mashed vegetables and saute for 5 minutes. 4. cook until the mixture loses its moisture and separates pan. 5. now add bhaja masala,½ tsp sugar and ¼ tsp salt. 6. mix well until spices are cooked well. 7. furthermore add 3 tbsp roasted & crushed peanuts, 2 tbsp coriander. 8. mix well, prepare cylindrical shape vegetable mixture. 9. dip in maida paste coating all over, then roll in breadcrumbs. 10. now deep fry in hot oil or bake in preheated oven at 180 degree celcius for 15 minutes. 11. finally, enjoy veg chop with tomato sauce.

title: Vegetable Curry Recipe
ingredients: 2.5 tablespoons oil, 1 cup onion, 1 green chili, 1 tablespoon ginger garlic paste, 1 cup tomatoes, 3 tablespoons coriander leaves, 1 tablespoon kasuri methi, 1.25 to 2 cups Hot water, 2 cashews, 0.875 cup carrot, 0.875 cup potatoes, 0.5 cup green beans, 0.625 cup or frozen peas, 1.5 cups cauliflower florets, 0.25 cup sweet corn kernels, 1 teaspoon Kashmiri red chili powder, 1 teaspoon garam masala, 1 teaspoon cumin powder, 1.25 teaspoon coriander powder, 0.125 teaspoon turmeric, 1 teaspoon salt, 0.5 teaspoon cumin seeds
instructions: 1. Omit if using coconut milk - To make cashew cream, soak the whole nuts in half cup hot water for 15 minutes. Grind in a small grinder with the soaked water to a smooth puree. You can add more water to make a smooth puree. 2. Pour oil to a hot pan. Add the whole spices & curry leaves (optional). When they begin to sizzle, add the onions and green chili. Saute until golden. 3. Add the ginger garlic and saute for a minute. Lower the heat and stir in the ground spices, followed by tomatoes. 4. Saute until the tomatoes cook down and begin to release oils. Optionally add the cashew cream or coconut milk, reserving 2 tbsps. to garnish. 5. Add all the vegetables and saute for 2 to 3 mins on a medium high heat. Pour half of the hot water & mix well. 6. Cover and cook on a medium heat until the veggies are fork tender, adding more hot water only as required. 7. Taste test and add more salt and garam masala if required. Crush kasuri methi in your palms and sprinkle. 8. Garnish Vegetable Curry with chopped coriander leaves & cashew or coconut cream. Serve with fluffy Basmati Rice, Coconut Rice, Jeera Rice, Turmeric Rice, Chapati, roti, Naan

title: Vegetable Jalfrezi Recipe (Veg Jalfrezi)
ingredients: 2 tablespoon oil, 0.5 teaspoon cumin seeds, 1 green chilli, 1 red chilli, 0.75 cup onions, 1 cup tomato puree, 1 tablespoon tomato sauce ketchup, 1 teaspoon ginger, 1 teaspoon garlic, 1 teaspoon red chilli powder, 1 teaspoon coriander powder, 0.5 teaspoon cumin powder, 0.25 teaspoon turmeric, 1 tablespoon Kasuri methi, 1 teaspoon garam masala, 0.5 teaspoon fennel powder, 1 teaspoon sugar, 2 tablespoon oil, 1 tablespoon ginger julienne, 2.5 tablespoons coriander leaves, 0.75 cup Carrots, 0.5 cup Green Beans, 0.25 cup Green peas, 1.5 cup Bell peppers, 0.5 cup Onion, 7 Baby corn, 2 tablespoons Sweet corn
instructions: 1. Prepare the following ingredients for the base: 2. ¾ cup fine chopped onions from 1 medium sized onion 3. 1½ cups tomatoes chopped & pureed (or 1 cup tomato puree (passata)) 4. ¼ cup Green peas – optional, use frozen or preboiled fresh matar 5. 2 tablespoons Sweet corn – optional, frozen or preboiled from fresh corn 6. You will need the following veggies for the stir fry: 7. 1½ cup Bell peppers – diced or batons, red, green, yellow, orange mixed capsicum 8. Measure the spices and keep aside. 9. teaspoon Kashmiri red chilli powder 1 teaspoon garam masala 1 teaspoon coriander powder ½ teaspoon cumin powder ½ teaspoon fennel powder (optional) 1 tablespoon Kasuri methi (dried fenugreek) ½ teaspoon cumin seeds 1 dried red chilli (optional) 10. Heat 2 tablespoons oil in a wok or pan. When the oil heats up slightly, reduce the heat to medium. Add ½ teaspoon cumin seeds and dried red chilli (optional). 11. When the cumin begins to sizzle, stir in the ginger and garlic. (1 teaspoon each) Saute for a minute. 12. Add the chopped onions and green chilli. Saute them until golden. 13. Reduce the flame to low, stir in red chili powder, cumin powder, coriander powder, & turmeric (optional). 14. Add the tomatoes. Mix well and cook until the tomatoes cook down. 15. When you see the oil begins to release, pour ¼ to ½ cup water and mix well. This step helps in bringing out the flavors better. 16. Let this cook on a low heat until thick & flavorful. While this cooks, go to the next step. 17. Meanwhile to another pan or wok, add 2 tablespoons ghee and add ginger (optional) carrots & beans. Sprinkle ⅛ teaspoon salt and stir fry on a high heat for 2 to 4 mins. 18. Add onions as well. 19. Add bell peppers, baby corn, peas and sweet corn. 20. Stir fry on a high heat until tender, cooked yet crunchy. Do not overcook the veggies, they should have some crunch. Turn off when it is done. 21. When your sauce is cooked well & becomes thick, add the kasuri methi, ½ to ¾ teaspoon salt, sugar, garam masala and fennel powder (optional). 22. Add the stir fried veggies too. Stir fry for 1 to 2 minutes. 23. Taste test and adjust salt if you want. If you feel the veggies are not tender enough to your liking, splash little water. You may cover and cook for a few minutes. But do not overcook to the extent they become mushy and soggy. 24. Serve Vegetable jalfrezi with steamed rice, Chapati, roti, naan, bhakri or even with noodles and Fried rice. We also stir in some cooked pasta and noodles to this veg jalfrezi. For more ideas take a look at the serving ideas section below.

title: Vegetable Salad Recipe
ingredients: 0.75 cup cucumber, 0.5 cup carrots, 0.25 cup onions, 0.375 cup tomato, 0.25 cup beetroot, 0.25 cup cabbage, 1 green chili, 0.125 teaspoon salt, 1 tablespoon lemon juice, 9 mint leaves, 2 tablespoons coriander leaves, 1 tablespoon extra virgin olive oil, 0.25 teaspoon yellow mustard powder, 1 tablespoons sesame seeds
instructions: 1. Wash all the vegetables thoroughly under running water. Wipe them dry. 2. Optional - If using cabbage, shred it and add to hot boiling water. Leave for 2 minutes. Remove and add them to cold water and rinse well. Spread it in the colander and set aside to drain completely. 3. Optional - If you want to reduce the pungency in onions, cut the onion to quarters and soak in water for 20 minutes. Or chop it and soak in some lemon juice for 20 minutes. 4. Peel and chop the other vegetables to bite sized pieces. Grate beetroot and carrots. Add them to a large serving bowl. 5. Deseed the green chilies or crush black pepper and set aside. 6. Add all the prepared vegetables, mint and coriander leaves to the bowl. When you are ready to serve the salad, add salt, lemon juice and black pepper. Toss them well. Lastly sprinkle oil and toss. 7. Garnish with seeds or nuts. Serve vegetable salad immediately with any meal.

title: Vegetable Soup Recipe (Indian Veg Soup)
ingredients: 0.5 tablespoon oil, 0.5 tablespoon garlic, 0.375 tablespoon ginger, 2 sprigs spring onions, 2 sprigs spring onion, 0.25 cup carrots, 0.25 cup peas, 0.25 cup sweet corn, 0.25 cup french beans, 0.5 cup cabbage, 2.5 cups water, 1 tablespoon corn starch, 0.25 cup water, 0.25 teaspoon salt, 0.75 teaspoon sugar, 1 teaspoon vinegar, 0.375 teaspoon red chilli flakes, 0.375 teaspoon pepper powder, 1 bay leaf
instructions: 1. Rinse all the vegetables under running water and chop them finely. Make sure all the veggies are of the same size otherwise one turns mushy and the other underdone. 2. Chop ginger and garlic as well. 3. Heat oil in a pot. Saute ginger, garlic and spring onion greens for a minute or 2. If using bay leaf and cinnamon you can add them here first. 4. Add all the veggies. 5. Then add in cabbage or any other leafy greens. 6. Fry all of them on a high flame for 2 to 3 mins to bring out aroma. 7. Pour water or stock. I used water here. 8. Cover and cook until slightly tender. 9. Meanwhile in a separate bowl stir in cornstarch or arrow root powder with half cup water. Ensure it is lump free. 10. If using boiled potato, add it to a blender jar and pour half cup water. Puree to a smooth paste. I usually add 2 cups of water to the pot and then 1 cup for potato puree. 11. When the veggies turn slightly tender, pour the corn starch to the boiling vegetable soup. Stir continuously and cook until it turns slightly thick. 12. Add salt and sugar (optional). 13. Add then crushed pepper. You can also add white pepper. 14. Turn off when the soup turns slightly thick. It thickens further after cooling. Very thick soup tastes starchy so do not thicken it a lot. The soup must be free flowing and not very thick. I prefer to add apple cider vinegar when the soup cools down a bit. Taste the soup and add more salt if desired. 15. Add red chili flakes and more spring onion greens. Serve Indian-Chinese vegetable soup hot or warm.

title: Vegetable Tikka Masala
ingredients: 0.25 cup cup oil, 2 cups red onions, 1 teaspoon sea salt, 1.5 tablespoons tablespoon ginger garlic paste, 1 teaspoon Kashmiri red chili powder, 0.25 teaspoon turmeric, 1 teaspoon garam masala, 1 tablespoon coriander powder, 1 teaspoon cumin powder, 1.25 cups tomato puree passata, 0.3333333333333333 cup cashews, 0.75 cup cold water, 1 cup boiled canned chickpeas, 0.5 teaspoon sugar jaggery, 1 tablespoon kasuri methi, 0.29166666666666663 cup heavy cream, 1 head cauliflower florets, 0.5 cup carrots, 1 cup bell peppers, 2 grams white button mushrooms, 0.5 cup green beans, 0.5 cup onion, 0.75 teaspoon Kashmiri red chili powder, 0.75 teaspoon garam masala, 1 teaspoon coriander powder, 0.5 teaspoon cumin powder, 0.5 teaspoon salt, 0.5 tablespoon ginger garlic paste, 2 grams paneer extra firm pressed tofu, 2 tablespoons coriander leaves
instructions: 1. Pour half of the ghee or oil to a pot and add onions & salt. Saute until golden, for about 9 to 10 mins. Stir in the ginger garlic and saute for a minute. 2. Stir in red chili powder, turmeric, garam masala, coriander powder and cumin powder. ¼ teaspoon turmeric, 1 teaspoon Kashmiri red chili powder, 1 teaspoon garam masala, 1 teaspoon cumin powder, 1 tablespoon coriander powder 3. Stir in red chili powder, turmeric, garam masala, coriander powder and cumin powder. 4. Transfer tomatoes and cook until mushy. (Canned puree takes only 2 to 3 mins and fresh tomatoes take 7 to 8 mins) 5. Pour cold water to a blender. Transfer the cooled onion tomato masala and the nuts. 6. Blend to a smooth sauce and pour back to the pan. Stir in the chickpeas if using. 7. Bring to a boil on a high heat and cook covered for 10 mins on a medium heat, stir every 4 to 5 mins. 8. Preheat oven to 220 C / 425F. Mix together kashmiri chili powder, garam masala, coriander powder, cumin powder, salt and ginger garlic & 2 tbsps oil (or hot melted ghee) in a bowl. ¾ teaspoon Kashmiri red chili powder, 1 teaspoon coriander powder, ¾ teaspoon garam masala, ½ teaspoon cumin powder, ½ teaspoon salt, ½ tablespoon ginger garlic paste 9. Preheat oven to 220 C / 425F. Mix together kashmiri chili powder, garam masala, coriander powder, cumin powder, salt and ginger garlic & 2 tbsps oil (or hot melted ghee) in a bowl. 10. Place cauliflower and mushrooms separately in a prepared baking tray. Reserve a tsp of the spice blend and drizzle the rest little by little (not all at one time) over cauliflower and mushrooms. Gently rub and mix well to coat well. Spread evenly. 11. Place in a preheated oven on the middle rack and bake for 20 mins. 12. Meanwhile add the carrots, bell peppers, quartered onions and beans to another prepared tray. Drizzle with the reserved spice mix and coat them well. Place this in the bottom rack during the last 10 mins (10 mins after the cauli & mushroom). 13. Optional if using paneer/tofu – To the spice bowl, add a tablespoon of lemon juice or yogurt, 1 tablespoon oil & other spices mentioned in the notes. Mix well and add the paneer. Coat the paneer well & reserve aside. 14. Optional – When the veggies are done roasting, remove from oven, transfer to one pan and spread the marinated paneer/tofu on the other. Place in the top rack, broil for 10 to 12 mins, until the marinade dries out. 15. After 10 mins of cooking the sauce, it should be thick. Mix in the roasted tikka vegetables, paneer/tofu, sugar/jaggery & cream. (Adjust the consistency by adding more cream or hot water if required) 16. Crush kasuri methi in your palms and add. Mix well and taste test to adjust salt and garam masala. Bring to a boil and turn off. 17. Garnish vegetable tikka masala with cream. Serve it hot with rice, naan or bread.

title: Vegetarian Club Sandwich
ingredients: 6 slices bread, 2 tbsps mayonnaise, 1 garlic, 1 cup cabbage, 0.625 cup bell peppers, 1 onion, 1 carrot, 1 tbsp oil, 0.5 tsp black pepper, salt, 1 medium tomato, 6 lettuce leaves, 1 potato, black pepper, salt
instructions: 1. Wash and peel a medium potato, slice to 1/4 inch thick slices. Boil them in a pan until cooked through. Drain water and set aside. 2. Butter and toast the bread slices until crisp on a pan or in a toaster, air fryer or oven. 3. Add a tsp of oil and roast potatoes on both sides till crispy. You can also sprinkle some seasoning if you like. Set these aside. 4. Add another tbsp of oil to the pan. Add garlic and saute for a minute. 5. Add onions, cabbage, carrots and capsicum. Stir fry on a high flame for 3 to 4 mins, until slightly tender yet crunchy. Add salt, chili flakes and black pepper. Mix and set aside to cool a bit. 6. Spread mayo or cream cheese or Greek yogurt as required. 7. On the first slice place lettuce, potatoes over it, sprinkle some pepper and salt if not used earlier. Then tomatoes. 8. on another slice, place lettuce and then some stir fried veggies. 9. Begin to assemble. Place the bread with tomato on the bottom. 10. Then place the slice with stir fried veggie over the first one. 11. Cover with the last slice with the mayo side down. Safe the sandwich with sandwich picks. Press down the sandwich and cut to halve or quarters. Serve club sandwich with in 2 hours. 12. Sandwich Recip... Cheese Sandwich R... Yogurt Sandwich (... Veg Grilled Sandw... Corn Sandwich Tomato Cucumber S...

title: veggie bites recipe | peri peri vegetable bites | veggie ball recipe
ingredients: 1 cup chana chickpea, 2 tbsp onion, 2 tbsp capsicum, 0.5 carrot, 2 tbsp peas matar, 1 tbsp corn, handful of coriander leaves, 1 tsp ginger-garlic paste, 2 tbsp corn flour, 0.5 tsp salt, 3 tbsp peri peri sauce, 0.5 cup bread crumbs, oil for deep frying
instructions: 1. firstly, take 1 cup soaked chana, 2 tbsp onion, 2 tbsp capsicum, ½ carrot, grated and 2 tbsp peas, 1 tbsp corn and handful of coriander leaves. 2. blend to coarse paste without adding any water. 3. further add 1 tsp ginger garlic paste, 2 tbsp corn flour and ½ tsp salt. 4. also add 3 tbsp peri peri sauce or alternatively use chilli powder, italian seasonings and aamchur. 5. combine well making sure the spices are mixed well. 6. further add ½ cup bread crumbs and combine well. 7. combine well to form a soft dough. 8. now grease hands with oil and prepare small balls. 9. deep fry the balls in hot oil or bake them in preheated oven at 180 degree celsius for 12 minutes. 10. stir occasionally and fry on medium flame. 11. fry till the veggie balls turn golden and crisp. drain off over kitchen paper to absorb excess oil. 12. finally, serve veggie balls with mayonnaise or tomato sauce.

title: Ven Pongal Recipe (Khara Pongal)
ingredients: 0.5 cup rice, 0.5 cup moong dal, 3.25 to 3 cups water, 0.5 teaspoon salt, 2.5 tablespoons ghee, 1 cashew nuts, 0.75 teaspoon cumin seeds, 0.5 teaspoon black pepper corn, 1 inch ginger, 1 sprig curry leaves, 0.125 teaspoon asafoetida, 1 green chili
instructions: 1. Add ½ cup dal to a pot or pressure cooker. (If you prefer to rinse the lentils before roasting, follow my step by step photo instructions in the post). 2. Dry roast on a low to medium flame till it begin to smell nice & aromatic. Do not brown or discolor the moong dal. This step is optional however pongal gets a real aroma from the roasted dal. 3. Add ½ cup rice to the roasted dal. Wash them at least three times. Drain the water completely. Pour 3¼ to 3½ cups water. Add ½ teaspoon salt. Cook the rice & dal to a soft texture. 4. For pressure cooking: If cooking directly in the pressure cooker, then cook for 2 to 3 whistles on a medium flame. If cooking in a bowl, then place it in the cooker and pressure cook for 4 whistles. When the pressure releases naturally, open the lid. 5. To cook in pot: You can also cook the rice & dal in a pot until soft & mushy. Add more water if needed as it cooks. 6. Open the cooker when the pressure drops. If you prefer, you can mash up the cooked rice & dal a bit to get creamy consistency. It should be mushy and soggy. 7. If it is too dry, add some boiling water to bring it to a consistency you like. Boil It for a few minutes. It should not be very runny or dry. Add more salt if needed and stir. 8. Heat a small pan with 2 tablespoons ghee. Split open 10 cashew nuts & fry them till golden. Remove these to a plate for garnish. 9. To the same pan, add ¾ teaspoon cumin seeds & ½ teaspoon crushed pepper. When the seeds splutter, lower the heat, add slit green chili (optional) & ginger. Saute for 30 seconds. 10. Add curry leaves. Saute well until the tempering turns aromatic & curry leaves turn crisp. Then add hing. We also add a pinch of turmeric & it is optional. 11. Pour this to the cooked pongal. Mix and simmer for 1 to 2 minutes so the flavors are absorbed. Serve ven pongal hot with coconut chutney or sambar. 12. Rinse rice and dal a couple of times and drain the water. Press SAUTE button and pour ghee to the steel insert. 13. Fry the cashews until golden and remove them to a plate. Then add cumin seeds and crushed pepper. 14. When they splutter, add ginger, curry leaves, green chili (optional) and hing. Saute for 30 seconds. 15. Then add turmeric, moong dal and rice. Saute for 2 to 3 mins until the moong dal begins to smell good. 16. Pour 3 cups water and add half teaspoon salt. Deglaze the pot by scrubbing the bottom with a spatula. 17. Press CANCEL button and secure the instant pot with the lid. Position the steam release valve to sealing. 18. Next press PRESSURE COOK button and set the timer for 9 mins. When the IP is done, it beeps. Let the pressure release naturally. 19. Stir and taste test. Add more salt if needed. If the consistency is too thick, pour some hot water & give a good mix. Garnish ven pongal with more hot ghee and fried cashews. If you want you may temper it once more but I have not felt the need.

title: Vendakkai Poriyal (Fry)
ingredients: 25 grams ladies finger, 1.5 to 2 tablespoons oil, 1 teaspoon urad dal, 2 teaspoon chana dal, 0.25 teaspoon mustard seeds, 0.5 teaspoon cumin seeds, 1 red chili, 1 sprig curry leaves, 1 Pinch hing, 0.375 teaspoon red chili powder, 0.75 tablespoon lemon juice, 0.125 teaspoon turmeric, Salt as needed, 0.75 tablespoon urad dal, 0.75 tablespoon chana dal, 0.5 teaspoon cumin seeds, 0.75 tablespoon sesame seeds, 0.75 tablespoon coconut, 1.5 red chili
