instructions: 1. This step is optional. You can also use idli podi to make the vendakkai poriyal flavorful. Dry roast dal and red chilies on a low heat until they turn aromatic. Add in the sesame and coconut. Roast until the seeds begin to splutter. Cool this and powder it. 2. Wash vendakkai under running water. Wipe dry with a cloth and chop to half inch thick pieces. 3. Heat a pan with oil and add the cumin and mustard. When they begin to splutter, add chana dal and urad dal. Fry them until golden, then add dried red chili and curry leaves. Add hing. 4. When the dal is fried well to golden, add chopped vendakkai. Saute for 2 to 3 mins on a medium heat. 5. Add Lemon juice. This helps the okra to turn less slimy while cooking. You can also omit lemon if you do not like it. 6. Keep stirring and fry the okra on a medium flame until it is cooked well completely. You can also cover and cook once the stickiness has gone. Add salt and turmeric when the stickiness has gone completely and okra is cooked. 7. Add red chili powder and the spice powder (or idli podi or raw coconut). 8. Mix and stir fry for 1 to 2 minutes. Serve vendakkai poriyal /fry with rice. 9. Bhindi Masala Rec... Aloo Bhindi Recip... Sauteed Okra Reci... Bhindi Do Pyaza Bhindi Fry Recipe... Ladies Finger Fry...

title: vermicelli custard recipe | semiya custard falooda | sevai custard
ingredients: 0.5 tsp ghee clarified butter, 0.5 cup vermicelli semiya, 4 cup milk, 0.25 tsp kesar saffron, 0.25 cup sugar, 2 tbsp custard powder, 0.5 cup milk, 2 tbsp sabja, 2 tbsp pomegranate, 5 grapes, 2 tbsp mango, 2 tbsp apple, 2 tbsp nuts, 2 tbsp tutti frutti, 1 cherry
instructions: 1. firstly, in a pan heat ½ tsp ghee and roast ½ cup vermicelli. 2. roast on low flame until the semiya turns golden brown. keep aside. 3. in a large kadai, heat 4 cup milk and ¼ tsp kesar. 4. stir well and get the milk to a boil. 5. add in roasted semiya and give a good mix. 6. also add ¼ cup sugar and mix well. 7. boil for 7 minutes or until semiya gets cooked completely. 8. in a small bowl take 2 tbsp custard powder and ½ cup milk. 9. mix well making sure there are no lumps. 10. pour in custard slurry and stir continuously. 11. cook until the milk thickens and turns creamy. 12. transfer the custard semiya into a large bowl. 13. cool completely, and refrigerated for 2 hours. 14. for serving, take a tall glass, and add 2 tbsp sabja. to prepare sabja, soak sabja seeds in enough water for 15 minutes or until it swells. 15. add ¼ cup chilled vermicelli custard. 16. now top with 2 tbsp pomegranate, 5 grapes, 2 tbsp mango and 2 tbsp apple. 17. further, pour in ¼ cup chilled vermicelli custard. 18. top with 2 tbsp nuts and 2 tbsp tutti frutti. 19. finally, garnish with a cherry and enjoy vermicelli custard.

title: vermicelli cutlet recipe | potato semiya cutlet | aloo vermicelli cutlet
ingredients: 2 tsp oil, 0.5 cup semiya vermicelli, 4 cup water, 0.5 tsp salt, 2 tbsp corn flour, 2 potato, 0.5 tsp ginger paste, 1 chilli, 0.5 tsp chilli flakes, 0.5 tsp cumin powder, 0.5 tsp garam masala, 0.5 tsp chaat masala, 0.5 cup bread crumbs, 2 tbsp coriander, 0.5 tsp salt, 0.25 cup corn flour, 0.25 cup maida, 0.25 tsp pepper powder, 0.25 tsp salt, 0.5 cup water, 1 cup vermicelli, oil
instructions: 1. firstly, in a pan, heat 2 tsp oil and add ½ cup semiya. 2. roast on low flame until the semiya turns golden brown. keep aside. 3. in a large vessel take 4 cup water, ½ tsp salt and get to a boil. 4. once the water comes to a boil, add roasted vermicelli and give a good stir. 5. boil for 2 minutes or until vermicelli is cooked well. 6. drain off the water and cool completely. make sure not to overcook vermicelli. 7. once the vermicelli is cooled completely, transfer to a large bowl and add 2 tbsp corn flour. 8. mix well making sure all the moisture from vermicelli is absorbed. 9. further add 2 potato, ½ tsp ginger paste, 1 chilli and ½ tsp chilli flakes. 10. also add ½ tsp cumin powder, ½ tsp garam masala and ½ tsp chaat masala. 11. now add ½ cup bread crumbs, 2 tbsp coriander and ½ tsp salt. 12. mix well making sure everything is well combined. 13. squeeze and mix well forming a soft dough. 14. grease your hands with oil and now pinch a ball sized dough. 15. roll the cylindrical shape and keep aside. 16. to prepare slurry, in a small bowl take ¼ cup corn flour, ¼ cup maida, ¼ tsp pepper powder and ¼ tsp salt. 17. adding ½ cup water prepare a smooth lump-free batter. 18. now dip the shaped cutlet mixture into slurry and then roll in vermicelli. 19. deep fry in hot oil, keeping the flame on medium. 20. stir occasionally, without breaking the cutlets. 21. fry until the cutlets turn golden brown and crisp. 22. drain off the semiya cutlet over a kitchen towel to remove excess oil. 23. finally, enjoy aloo semiya cutlet with tomato sauce.

title: vermicelli pudding recipe | nawabi semai recipe | nawabi sawai dessert
ingredients: 3 grams semiya vermicelli, 3 tbsp butter, 1 cup khova mawa, 0.5 cup powdered sugar, 4 cup milk, 0.5 cup custard powder, 1 cup condensed milk, 2 tbsp almonds, 2 tbsp pistachios, 2 tbsp cashew
instructions: 1. firstly, in a pan heat 3 tbsp butter and roast 300 grams semia. 2. roast on low flame until it turns crunchy and light golden brown. 3. turn off the flame, add 1 cup khova and ½ cup powdered sugar. 4. mix well making sure everything is well combined. keep aside. 5. firstly, in a large bowl take 4 cup milk. 6. add ½ cup custard powder, 1 cup condensed milk and mix well. 7. mix well making sure there are no lumps. 8. pour the mixture into large kadai and cook on low flame. 9. keep stirring on a low flame until the mixture thickens. 10. cook until the mixture turns creamy thick. it thickens once cooled completely. 11. firstly, in pan transfer half the amount of roasted semiya. 12. press and level it up, making sure it will be tight. 13. pour in prepared custard, leaving some gap for semiya to top it up. 14. now top up with roasted semiya and then roasted nuts (almonds, pistachios and cashews). 15. cover and refrigerate for 4 hours or until the custard sets completely. 16. finally, cut the nawabi semiya into pieces and enjoy.

title: vermicelli pulao recipe | semiya pulao | shavige pulav | sevai pulao
ingredients: 1 tsp ghee clarified butter, 1 cup vermicelli semiya, handful coriander, handful mint pudina, 1 chilli, 2 tbsp ghee clarified butter, 2 bay leaf, 3 pod cardamom, 1 inch cinnamon, 4 clove 4 clove, 1 star anise, 1 tsp cumin jeera, 15 whole cashew kaju, 1 onion, 1 tsp ginger garlic paste, 0.5 capsicum, 0.5 carrot, 2 tbsp peas matar, 5 beans, 0.75 tsp garam masala, 0.75 tsp salt, 1.5 cup water, 2 tsp lemon juice
instructions: 1. firstly, take 1 tsp ghee in a pan and roast 1 cup vermicelli. 2. roast on low flame until it turns golden brown. you can use roasted vermicelli in place. however, i still recommend roasting for non-sticky pulao. keep aside. 3. in a small blender take handful coriander, mint and 1 chilli. 4. blend to smooth paste adding water as required. keep aside. 5. in a large kadai, heat 2 tbsp ghee and saute 2 bay leaf, 3 pod cardamom, 1 inch cinnamon, 4 clove, 1 star anise, 1 tsp cumin and 15 whole cashew. 6. roast on low flame until spices turn aromatic and cashew turn crunchy. 7. now add 1 onion, 1 tsp ginger garlic paste and saute well. 8. further add ½ capsicum, ½ carrot, 2 tbsp peas and 5 beans. 9. stir fry for 2 minutes without overcooking vegetables. 10. add in prepared masala paste, ¾ tsp garam masala and ¾ tsp salt. 11. saute well until all spices are well combined. 12. pour in 1½ cup water and get the water to a rolling boil. 13. add in roasted vermicelli and give a good mix. 14. cover and simmer for 7 minutes or until water are absorbed completely. 15. now mix gently, making sure vermicelli is well cooked. 16. cover and rest for 5 minutes. this helps to get non-sticky semiya. 17. finally, just before serving vermicelli pulao, squeeze 2 tsp lemon juice.

title: Vrat Wale Aloo Recipe | Upvas Aloo Sabzi - 2 Ways | Fasting Curry
ingredients: 2 inch ginger, 2 chilli, 0.5 cup coriander, 2 tbsp oil, 1 tsp cumin, 1 tsp kasuri methi, 1 tsp chilli powder, 0.5 tsp cumin powder, 3 tomato, 3 potato, 1 tsp sugar, 1 tsp salt, 2 cup water, 2 tbsp coriander
instructions: 1. firstly, in a mortar pestle take 2 inch ginger, 2 chilli and ½ cup coriander. 2. crush and coarsely paste the masala. keep aside. 3. firstly, in a large kadai heat 2 tbsp oil. add 1 tsp cumin, 1 tsp kasuri methi and saute until it turns aromatic. 4. add crushed coriander paste and saute slightly. 5. now keeping the flame on low, add 1 tsp chilli powder and ½ tsp cumin powder. 6. saute until the spices turn aromatic. 7. add 3 tomatoes and saute well. 8. cover and cook until the tomatoes turn soft and mushy. 9. now add 3 potato, 1 tsp sugar and 1 tsp salt. 10. saute for a minute or until the spices are well combined with aloo. 11. further, add 2 cup water and mix well adjusting the consistency. 12. cover and boil for 5 minutes, or until the flavours are absorbed well. 13. add 2 tbsp coriander and mix well. you can also add lemon juice for sourness. 14. finally, add vrat wale aloo sabji with roti.

title: Watermelon Juice Recipe
ingredients: 5 cups watermelon, 2.5 tablespoons lemon juice, 5 cups watermelon, 9 mint leaves, 0.5 inch ginger, 2.5 tablespoons lemon juice, 0.25 teaspoon pink salt, 4 cups Watermelon, 2.5 Oranges, 3.25 cups Watermelon, 1 cup strawberries, 1 cup ice cubes, 5 cups Watermelon, 2 inch Aloe vera gel, 9 mint leaves, 2 tablespoons lemon juice, 2 pinches ground black pepper, 1 teaspoon chia seeds, 0.25 teaspoon chaat masala
instructions: 1. Rinse watermelon under running water. Pat dry with kitchen tissues or air dry it for a while. 2. To start with cut the watermelon in the center, to 2 parts. Invert the cutside of the watermelon on to the chopping board, so it rests without rolling around. Then quarter each part, following the lines on the watermelon. 3. Slice each quarter further to 2 to 3 parts (lengthwise) to help deseed watermelon easily. Using a small knife, gently remove the seeds following the line. Tender white seeds are okay to be used. 4. Chop the watermelon pulp from the rind. To avoid ice cubes, you can chill the watermelon before juicing. 5. Add the ingredients to a blender jar and blend till smooth & frothy. If you do not have a powerful blender, then start with just a handful of watermelon cubes and then add the rest later. Or pour half cup chilled water and blend. 6. If using soaked chia or sabja seeds, add them to your serving glass. Then pour the watermelon juice & top with black pepper or chaat masala. Serve it immediately. 7. Without Strainer: Juice the cut oranges in a electric or manual squeezer/juicer. Blend the watemelon until smooth and frothy in a blender. Pour the required amount of orange juice to the serving glasses and top with watermelon juice. 8. Strained Juice: Peel the oranges and remove the pith, seperate the segments and deseed them. You may check this orange juice post for easy way to deseed oranges. Add the watermelons to a blender and oranges. Blend until smooth. Pass the juice through a strainer if you want. 9. Use a smoothie strainer to retain most of the pulp in your watermelon juice. All of the 5 versions work well in a cold press juicer. For the strawberry version use about ¼ cup water instead of ice.

title: wheat bread recipe | whole wheat bread | wholemeal bread or atta bread
ingredients: 1 cup milk, 2 tbsp sugar, 0.5 tbsp dry yeast, 3 cup wheat flour atta, 1 tsp salt, 2 tbsp oil, 0.5 cup water, 0.5 tsp butter, 26 ml water, 0.5 tsp salt, 3 tbsp sugar, 2.5 tbsp sugar, 21 gm maida plain flour, 21 gm wheat flour atta, 1.5 tsp dry yeast
instructions: 1. firstly, in a large mixing bowl take 1 cup warm milk. 2. also, add 2 tbsp sugar and ½ tbsp dry yeast. mix well. 3. rest and allow the yeast to activate. 4. further add 3 cup wheat flour, 1 tsp salt and 2 tbsp oil. mix well making sure everything is combined well. 5. additionally, add ½ cup water and knead well. 6. cover with cling wrap or moist cloth and rest for 2 hours. 7. after 2 hours, the dough will double in size. knead again to a cylindrical shape. 8. cover and rest for 30 minutes or till dough rise just an inch above the loaf pan. 9. place the bread loaf pan in preheated oven and bake at 180-degree celsius for 30 minutes. 10. finally, serve whole wheat bread or atta bread with jam or make a sandwich.

title: Wheat Dosa | Godhuma Dosa
ingredients: 0.5 cup wheat flour, 0.25 cup rice flour, 0.25 teaspoon salt, 1 pinch cumin seeds, 5.5 curry leaves, 1.5 green chilies, 1.25 cup water, 2 tablespoons ghee, 2 tablespoons onions, 0.375 teaspoon ginger, 1 teaspoon curd
instructions: 1. To make godhuma dosa, add flour, salt, chilies, curry leaves, onions, ginger and cumin to a mixing bowl. 2. Pour water little by little to make thin runny batter. If using curd you can also add it now. 3. The batter has to be runny of free flowing (pouring consistency). Else add more water and bring it to the consistency. 4. If using a pan that doesn’t have a non-stick coating, heat it first and then add few drops of oil to the pan. 5. Rub oil on the tawa with a small piece of onion or kitchen tissue. 6. Heat it on a medium high flame. The pan has to be hot but not extremely smoking hot. When the tawa is hot enough. stir the batter well. (the trick here is hot pan but not smoking hot that it burns the dosa) 7. Pour the batter from a little height starting from the sides all around the pan. Fill up the gaps if any. Do not spread it like a normal dosa. 8. Drizzle some oil towards the edges & on the dosa as well. Let it cook on a medium to low heat. 9. When it is cooked, you will see the edges leaving the pan on its own. Wheat dosa also turns golden and crisp. Lift the dosa with a wooden spoon. 10. If the wheat dosa is very thin you don't need to cook on the other side. If it is thick then flip it and cook on the other side as well. Flip back and cook to get a crispy dosa. 11. To make more dosas, if the tawa is extremely hot sprinkle little water. The water evaporates quickly, wait for the pan to heat again. Then stir the batter well with a ladle and pour it the same way. 12. Serve wheat dosa with your favorite chutney.

title: Wheat Porridge (Wheat Baby Food)
ingredients: 3 tbsp Wheat flour, 2 ml water, 1 Apple, 0.125 tsp ghee, 1 Ripe banana, 3.5 Ripe chikoo, 1 pear
instructions: 1. Optional step - Dry roast 1 cup of wheat flour on a medium flame until it smells good. Cool this completely. You can sieve the flour if it has bran. Transfer to a air tight jar. Use this when ever needed. 2. Add wheat flour to a pan and pour water. If you pour water to hot flour it will turn lumpy. So cool the flour first and then pour water. 3. Stir well with a spoon until smooth. 4. Begin to cook on a medium heat stirring often until the mixture thickens. 5. Turn off the stove. Add ghee. Stir and keep covered for at least 5 mins. Cool this. 6. Meanwhile wash and peel the apple or any other fruit you have already introduced. 7. Cut to pieces and add it to a blender. Make a fine puree. 8. Pour this to the cooled wheat porridge. Mix well. If you haven't been giving raw apple yet to your baby then, pour the pureed apple to the hot wheat porridge. Do not cook further. Just mix and keep the pot covered for a while. The apple gets cooked slightly. 9. Cool the apple wheat porridge completely and then feed your baby.

title: wheat sweet recipe | button sweet recipe | simple aate ki mithai
ingredients: 1.5 cup wheat flour, 1 cup milk powder, 0.5 tsp baking powder, 1 tbsp ghee clarified butter, warm milk, oil, 2 cup sugar, 3 pods cardamom, 2 cup water
instructions: 1. firstly, in a large bowl take 1½ cup wheat flour, 1 cup milk powder and ½ tsp baking powder. 2. add 1 tbsp ghee and mix forming a moist flour. 3. add ½ cup warm milk and start to knead. 4. knead to a smooth and soft dough adding milk as required. 5. roll the dough to a slightly thick thickness. 6. now cut into small circles using a cap of the bottle. 7. drop into hot oil and fry on low flame. 8. stir occasionally and fry until it turns golden brown. 9. drain off the pieces to remove excess oil. keep aside. 10. in a large vessel take 2 cup sugar, 3 pods cardamom, and 2 cup water. 11. stir and boil for 2 minutes or until the sugar syrup turns sticky. do not attain 1 string consistency. 12. now pour hot sugar syrup over the fried pieces. 13. dip completely, and allow to soak for 2 hours or until the pieces absorb the sugar syrup. 14. finally, enjoy button sweet or wheat sweet garnished with chopped nuts.

title: Wheatgrass Juice Recipe
ingredients: 3 grams wheatgrass, 1 apple, 1.5 oranges, 3 grams wheatgrass, 1.25 cups pineapple, ginger
instructions: 1. Make sure you choose fresh and young grass to minimize the bitter taste and grass smell. 2. Choose one or more of your favorite fruits for juicing. Our choice of combinations are 3. Wash the grass well in ample amount of water. I usually sprinkle some sea salt and little water over the grass. Leave for 10 mins and then rinse thoroughly in a large pot of water. Drain in a colander. 4. Do not juice the grass for long time, it begins to oxidize and smell stronger. It also alters the taste. 5. A cold press juicer is best, but a blender too works well. The juice extracted in a slow or cold press juicer is not diluted so it tastes much superior to the juice made in blender 6. Grape Juice Recip... Apple Juice Recip... Orange Juice Reci... Pomegranate Juice... Watermelon Juice ... Wheatgrass Shot

title: Wheatgrass shot
ingredients: 25 grams Wheatgrass, Hand pestle
instructions: 1. Wash wheatgrass thoroughly under running water. Use fresh and green grass that is young and tender. Discard the yellow grass. Drain completely. 2. Add them to whatever equipment you want to use. 3. Blend completely as much as possible. If making in juicer it gets jammed after making 90 to 120 ml. You will have to remove the pulp manually and continue to juice. 4. If making in a hand pestle, you will have to make a complete smooth paste. Then add it to a cheese cloth and extract the juice. 5. If making in a blender too, you will have to add to a cheese cloth. Extract the juice. 6. Consume 60 to 120 ml immediately after juicing. Within few minutes wheatgrass juice begins to get oxidized and the nutritional values begin to diminish.

title: White Burfi Recipe | Maida Ki Barfi | Plain flour Burfi Recipe
ingredients: 0.5 cup ghee clarified butter, 1 cup maida plain flour refined flour all purpose flour, 2 cup sugar, 1 cup water, 0.25 tsp cardamom powder elachi powder, 2 drop orange food colour, 2 drop green food colour
instructions: 1. firstly, in a wide pan heat ½ cup ghee. 2. once the ghee is hot add in 1 cup maida. 3. keeping the flame on low. 4. roast maida till it turns aromatic. approx. 2 minutes. keep aside. 5. in another kadai take 2 cup sugar and 1 cup water. 6. stir well and dissolve sugar. 7. also get the sugar syrup to boil keeping the flame on medium. 8. boil the sugar syrup till one string consistency has reached. 9. now keeping the flame on low add in roasted maida. 10. stir continuously, till the maida gets combined well without any lumps. 11. add in ¼ tsp cardamom powder and mix well. 12. cook the maida mixture till it forms a flowing consistency batter. 13. divide the maida mixture into 3 equal parts for making 3 layers. 14. also mix 2 drop orange food colour (red + yellow) and 2 drop of green food colour in each. 15. spread the orange layer and flatten with a cup. 16. further spread plain maida layer followed by green layer and flatten with a cup. 17. allow to rest for 1 minutes or till it sets completely. 18. now reverse and cut into square pieces. 19. finally, serve tiranga burfi - maida burfi or store in a airtight container and enjoy for a week.

title: white kurma recipe | white veg kurma saravana bhavana style
ingredients: 0.5 cup coconut, 1 tbsp roasted gram dal putani, 8 cashew kaju, 2 chilli, 0.5 inch cinnamon, 3 pods cardamom elachi, 1 tsp fennel saunf, 1 tbsp poppy seeds khus khus, 0.25 cup water, 2 tbsp oil, 1 tsp cumin jeera, 1 bay leaf, 0.5 onion, 1 tsp ginger paste, 1 carrot, 1 potato aloo, 6 beans, 4 tbsp peas matar, 1 tsp salt, 0.25 cup water, 1 cup water, 2 tbsp coriander, 2 tbsp lemon juice
instructions: 1. firstly, in a small blender take ½ cup coconut, 1 tbsp putani and 8 cashews. 2. also add 2 chilli, ½ inch cinnamon, 3 pods cardamom, 1 tsp fennel and 1 tbsp poppy seeds. 3. blend to smooth paste adding ¼ cup water. keep aside. 4. in a large kadai heat 2 tbsp oil and saute 1 tsp cumin, 1 bay leaf. 5. also, saute ½ onion and 1 tsp ginger paste until it softens. 6. further add 1 carrot, 1 potato, 6 beans and 4 tbsp peas. 7. add 1 tsp salt and saute for 2 minutes. 8. now add ¼ cup water, cover and cook for 5 minutes. 9. once the vegetables are almost cooked add in the prepared white masala paste. 10. saute for 2 minutes until the raw flavours disappear. 11. add in 1 cup water and mix adjusting consistency as required. 12. cover and boil for 5 minutes making sure the flavours are well absorbed. 13. also add 2 tbsp coriander, 2 tbsp lemon juice and mix well. 14. finally, enjoy white kurma with chapati and idiyappam.

title: White Sauce Pasta (Bechamel Sauce Pasta)
ingredients: 1 cup pasta, 4 cups water, 1.5 cup milk, 1.5 tablespoon all-purpose flour, 2 tablespoons butter, 0.25 teaspoon black pepper, 2 garlic cloves, 0.5 teaspoon oregano, salt, 0.5 teaspoon red chilli flakes, 0.25 cup heavy cream, 0.25 cup carrots, 0.25 cup corn kernels, 0.25 cup broccoli, 0.25 cup bell peppers
instructions: 1. Boil Pasta: Bring water to a rolling boil in a large pot. Add salt and pasta. Cook till al dente on a medium high flame. Read instructions on package for timings. 2. Drain Pasta: Reserve ¼ cup pasta stock and drain the pasta to a colander. Cover and keep aside. 3. Saute Veggies: Pour ½ tbsp butter to a pan and saute vegetables until slightly tender yet crunchy, for 5 to 6 mins. Remove to a plate and set aside. 4. Make the sauce: Melt 2 tablespoons butter on a medium heat and fry garlic for 30 to 40 seconds. Stir in all-purpose flour and saute well until the flour loses the raw smell, for about a minute. 5. Turn off the heat/stove and slowly whisk in ½ cup milk into the roux. Keep whisking till it looks creamy & uniform to prevent forming lumps. 6. Pour the rest of the milk and whisk/stir well. Turn on the stove, cook on a medium-low stirring often, scraping the sides, until the white sauce becomes thick. 7. Stir in the heavy cream or cheese. The white sauce is done perfectly when it is thick enough to coat the back of the spoon. Alternately you can draw a finger/line through the coated spoon. The sauce should wipe clean and leave a space, meaning it is thick enough. 8. Stir in the vegetables, cooked pasta, pepper, oregano (or mixed Italian herbs) and chili flakes. If the sauce looks too thick (as it cools down), add 2 tbsps of the reserved stock so the sauce loosens a bit. 9. Garnish white sauce pasta with red chilli flakes and crushed black pepper. Serve it hot or warm as the sauce thickens more when it cools down.

title: Yakhni Pulao (Mutton Pulao)
ingredients: 1.5 lbs bone-in mutton, 1 tablespoon ghee, 1 teaspoon black pepper, 1 teaspoon cumin seeds, 1 tablespoon coriander seeds, 1 tablespoon fennel seeds, 6 green cardamoms, 1 black cardamom, 6 cloves 6 cloves, 2 inch piece of cinnamon, 1 medium yellow, 4 cloves garlic, 1 inch ginger, 1.5 teaspoon sea salt, 3 cups water, 2 cups aged extra long basmati rice, 3 tablespoons ghee, 1 bay leaf, 1.5 star anise, 0.75 teaspoon shahi jeera, 2 inch cinnamon piece, 6 green cardamoms, 1 tablespoon ginger garlic paste, 3 green chilies, 1 medium red onion, 0.25 cup Greek yogurt, 0.5 teaspoon garam masala, 1 teaspoon fennel powder, 2 tablespoons coriander leaves
instructions: 1. Heat a tablespoon of ghee in the pot or pressure cooker and add the mutton. Sear for 5 mins on a medium high heat. 2. Stir in the whole spices mentioned for yakhni and let them sizzle for a minute. Add salt, onions, ginger & garlic. Pour hot water & mix well. 3. Pressure cooker: Cover with a lid and pressure cook for 3 whistles on a medium heat or in the instant pot for 8 to 10 mins. When the pressure drops, open the lid, it should be fully cooked. 4. Cook in a pot: Bring to a rolling boil and skim off the froth. Cook until the meat is tender. It should be cooked fully but not overcooked. 5. Remove the mutton and reserve aside in a bowl & cover. Strain the yakhni and press down with a spoon to extract the flavors. Discard the spices, onions etc in the strainer. Measure the yakhni and add more water to make it 4 cups (945 ml). (read notes) 6. When you are ready to make the pulao, rinse rice thrice and soak in 4 cups of water for only 30 mins. Later drain to a colander. 7. Heat a wide pot with ghee and add the sliced onions. Saute for 8 to 9 mins on a medium heat, until deep golden. 8. Stir in the whole spices, followed by ginger garlic paste & green chilies. Saute for 1 to 2 mins and add the mutton. Saute the mutton for 2 to 3 mins. 9. Stir in the garam masala, fennel powder, a generous pinch of salt and yogurt. Cook until the moisture evaporates. Mix in the yakhni and taste test to adjust salt. It should taste slightly salty. 10. Bring to a rolling boil and add the drained rice. Mix and cook uncovered on a medium high heat for 7 mins. (should be boiling rapidly) 11. Cover & dum cook on a low heat for 10 to 12 mins, until all the water is absorbed. 12. Rest for 15 mins before uncovering. Garnish with fine chopped coriander leaves & fried onions. Serve yakhni pulao hot with mirchi ka salan, raita and vegetable salad.

title: Yakhni Pulao Recipe | Vegetable Yakhni Pilaf
ingredients: 2 tbsp oil, 2 tbsp cashew, 2 tbsp almonds, 2 tbsp raisins, 2 bay leaf, 1 inch cinnamon, 1 tsp pepper, 1 tsp fennel, 0.5 javetri, 0.5 tsp cloves, 1 tsp cumin, 1 onion, 1 inch ginger, 5 cloves garlic, 6 chilli, 5 beans, 1 carrot, 3 tbsp peas, 1 potato, 0.5 tsp cumin powder, 0.5 tsp coriander powder, 0.5 tsp garam masala, 0.5 cup curd, 3 cup veg stock, 2 tsp salt, 1.5 cup basmati rice, 3 tbsp coriander
instructions: 1. Firstly, in a large kadai, heat 2 tbsp oil and add 2 tbsp cashews, 2 tbsp almonds and 2 tbsp raisins. 2. Roast till the nuts turn golden brown. Keep aside. 3. Now add 1 onion, 1 inch of ginger, 5 cloves of garlic, and 6 chilli and sauté until the onions turn golden brown. 4. Further add 5 beans, 1 carrot, 3 tbsp peas, 1 potato, ½ tsp cumin powder, ½ tsp coriander powder and ½ tsp garam masala. 5. Sauté on a low flame till the spices turn aromatic. 6. Now add ½ cup curd and cook till the oil separates from the sides. 7. Add 3 cups of veg stock, 2 tsp salt, and bring to a boil. 8. Further add 1½ cups of basmati rice and mix gently. 9. Cover and simmer for 20 minutes, or until the rice is tender and cooked through. 10. Also, add 3 tbsp of coriander, fried nuts, and mix gently without breaking the rice. 11. Finally, enjoy Yakhni Pulao Recipe with raita.

title: Yam fry (suran fry)
ingredients: 1 cup yam, 1 green chili, 0.5 tsp ginger garlic paste, 0.5 tsp garam masala, 0.5 tsp red chili powder, 2 sprigs curry leaves, 0.25 tsp mustard, 0.5 tsp cumin, 1 Pinch turmeric, 1 Pinch hing, 1.25 tbsp ghee
instructions: 1. Soak yam in water for about 15 minutes for the mud to melt off. Wash thoroughly. 2. Peel and chop to 1 inch pieces and add them to a pot of water. 3. Boil yam until fork tender yet firm and not mushy. Do not over boil. Drain them. Or you can also cook the whole yam in pressure cooker with little water for 3 to 4 whistles. Once cool peel off the skin and chop to pieces. 4. Heat a pan with ghee. Add curry leaves, green chili and fry till crisp. 5. Add cumin and mustard, when they splutter add hing. Stir in the ginger garlic and saute for 30 seconds. 6. Add cooked yam pieces, salt and turmeric. 7. Fry on high heat for 4 to 5 mins. , Keep stirring to prevent burning. If needed add little more ghee. 8. Add pepper powder or red chili powder, garam masala and fry for a min or 2. 9. Serve yam fry with rice. You can squeeze in some lemon juice.

title: Yogurt Sandwich Recipe (Hung Curd Sandwich)
ingredients: 4 slices bread, 0.29166666666666663 cup Greek Yogurt, 0.25 teaspoon Salt, 1 garlic clove, 0.375 teaspoon black pepper, 0.25 teaspoon mustard, 0.5 teaspoon red chili flakes, 1 green chili, 2 tablespoons herbs, 1.25 tablespoon butter, 1 teaspoon extra virgin olive oil, 0.25 cup carrots, 2.5 tablespoons onion, 0.25 tablespoons bell peppers
instructions: 1. To make 2 sandwiches, you will need ¼ to ⅓ cup Greek Yogurt (hung curd), ¼ to ½ teaspoon black pepper, ¼ teaspoon Salt and ¼ teaspoon ground mustard (optional or organic mustard sauce). 2. You will need half cup grated & chopped veggies or for convenience use store bought organic coleslaw mix. Here is what I use 3. 2 to 3 tablespoons fine chopped onion (or ¼ cup blanched, drained & shredded cabbage) 4. ¼ cup bell peppers fine chopped (or boiled sweet corn kernels) 5. 2 tablespoons chopped coriander or parsley 6. 1 green chilli optional chopped 7. Add mustard, salt, pepper, red chili flakes (optional). 8. Optional If you want you may add some healthy cold pressed organic oil of choice. I used 1 tablespoon extra virgin cold pressed olive oil. 9. Mix and taste test. If you want add more yogurt or more veggies and spices to taste. 10. Butter your bread slices or drizzle some ghee and toast them on a griddle. If you want to make these in air fryer or sandwich toasted, read my instructions in the recipe card below. You can also skip this toasting step and make the sandwich with fresh bread. 11. Turn to the other side and toast until golden. Turn off the heat. 12. Let the bread cool down a bit. Then spread the yogurt filling you made. 13. Cover with another slice and serve right away or with in 2 hours. Yogurt sandwich tends to become sour if you leave it at room temperature for too long and this can also grow bacteria. Slice the Hung curd sandwich and serve.

title: Zingy Parcel Recipe - Dominos Style | Paneer Zingy Veg Parcel - On Tawa
ingredients: 1 cup milk, 1 tsp sugar, 1 tsp dry yeast, 2 cup maida, 2 clove garlic, 0.5 tsp mixed herbs, 0.5 tsp chilli flakes, 0.5 tsp salt, 2 tsp oil, 2 tbsp oil, 2 clove garlic, 0.5 onion, 2 tbsp sweet corn, 2 tbsp capsicum, 2 tbsp tomato sauce, 2 tbsp eggless mayonnaise, 0.5 tsp mixed herbs, 0.5 tsp chilli flakes, 0.5 tsp chilli powder, 0.5 tsp salt, 0.5 cup paneer, cheese
instructions: 1. firstly, in a large bowl take ½ cup warm milk, 1 tsp sugar and 1 tsp dry yeast. 2. mix well and allow the yeast to activate. 3. once the yeast activates, add 2 cup maida, 2 clove garlic, ½ tsp mixed herbs, ½ tsp chilli flakes and ½ tsp salt. 4. mix well and start to knead the dough. 5. add milk as required and knead to a smooth dough. 6. now add 2 tsp oil and continue to knead the dough. 7. tuck the dough, cover and rest for 2 hours or until the dough doubles in size. 8. firstly, in a large pan heat 2 tbsp oil and saute 2 clove garlic. 9. add ½ onion and saute until the onion shrinks. 10. now add 2 tbsp sweet corn, 2 tbsp capsicum and saute well. 11. also add 2 tbsp tomato sauce, 2 tbsp eggless mayonnaise, ½ tsp mixed herbs, ½ tsp chilli flakes, ½ tsp chilli powder and ½ tsp salt. 12. mix well making sure everything is well combined. 13. further, add ½ cup paneer and mix well. stuffing is ready, keep it aside. 14. after the dough has rested for 2 hours, punch the dough gently and knead slightly. 15. pinch a ball sized dough and roll gently. 16. fold the sides shaping into a triangle. 17. place a tsp cheese, followed by 1 tbsp prepared paneer stuffing and cheese. 18. seal the tips with water and bring them together. 19. brush the parcel with milk to get a golden colour. 20. you can bake in kadai for 20 minutes or bake in the oven for 15 minutes. 21. now brush with butter to get the shiny crust. 22. finally, enjoy zingy parcel recipe with sauce.

title: Zucchini Curry Recipe | Indian Courgette Curry
ingredients: 25 grams zucchini, 1 cup onions, 1 cup tomatoes, 1 green chilli pepper, 1 teaspoon ginger, 1 sprig curry leaves, 1.5 tablespoon oil, 1 pinch mustard seeds, 0.5 teaspoon cumin seeds, 0.75 teaspoon garam masala, 0.75 teaspoon red chilli powder, 0.5 teaspoon salt, 0.25 teaspoon turmeric, 0.5 cup green peas, 1 teaspoon kasuri methi, 2 tablespoon coriander leaves, 0.375 cup coconut milk
instructions: 1. Rinse onions, tomatoes, chilies, ginger and fine chop them. Deseed the chilli and chop or slit. 2. Rinse zucchini well under running water. Cut off the end (a ¾ inch slice) and rub it for a few minutes against the other part until a white froth like substance comes out. Repeat this on the other end as well. 3. Rinse well again and chop to 1 inch pieces. 4. Pour oil to a pot & heat it. When the oil turns hot, add mustard and cumin seeds. 5. Add curry leaves, ginger & green chilies. Saute for 30 seconds. 6. Then add onions and fry them until golden. This takes about 3 to 4 mins. 7. Regulate the heat/flame to medium. Stir in red chilli powder, turmeric, salt and garam masala. 8. Add tomatoes and zucchini. Stir fry for 3 mins until the veggies begin to sweat. 9. Cover and cook on a lowest flame/heat until tomatoes breakdown well and zucchini turns slightly tender (adjust cook time to suit your liking here). 10. Later add green peas and kasuri methi. Stir and cook covered for 1 to 2 minutes. If you do not like mushy zucchini then cook without covering until the peas are done. 11. Taste test the sabzi and add more salt & garam masala if needed. For gravy version, simply pour the coconut milk and mix well. Bring it to a gentle boil and turn off the heat. 12. Garnish with chopped coriander leaves. Serve zucchini curry with rice or roti.

title: Zucchini Stir Fry Recipe
ingredients: 1.5 cups zucchini, 1 onion, 0.5 cup bell peppers, 0.75 tablespoon garlic, 0.5 teaspoon ginger, 1.25 tablespoons oil, 1 teaspoon soya sauce, 1 teaspoon vinegar, 0.75 teaspoon black pepper, 1 teaspoon toasted sesame seeds
instructions: 1. Rinse all the veggies. Slice onions and bell peppers thin. Chop zucchini to ¼ inch thickness. Chop ginger and garlic. 2. Pour oil to a hot pan. Stir fry ginger and garlic for 30 seconds. 3. Add onions and fry until transparent. Then stir fry bell peppers for 30 seconds. 4. Next add zucchini and stir fry on a high heat until half done yet crunchy. Do not over cook as they tend to turn too soft. 5. Then pour soya sauce and vinegar. Add black pepper /steak seasoning/garam masala. Stir fry just for 30 to 60 seconds. 6. Turn off the heat and sprinkle toasted sesame seeds or roasted & crushed peanuts. Taste test and sprinkle salt if you want. 7. Serve zucchini stir fry as a side or in your wraps and sandwiches.

title: ಬೆಳ್ಳುಳ್ಳಿ ಚೀಸ್ ಟೋಸ್ಟ್ | garlic cheese toast in kannada
instructions: 1. ಮೊದಲನೆಯದಾಗಿ, ದೊಡ್ಡ ಮಿಕ್ಸಿಂಗ್ ಬೌಲ್‌ನಲ್ಲಿ 2 ಟೀಸ್ಪೂನ್ ಬೆಣ್ಣೆ ಮತ್ತು ¾ ಕಪ್ ಮೊಝರೆಲ್ಲ ಚೀಸ್ ತೆಗೆದುಕೊಳ್ಳಿ. 2. 5 ಲವಂಗ ಬೆಳ್ಳುಳ್ಳಿ, ½ ಟೀಸ್ಪೂನ್ ಮೆಣಸು, ½ ಟೀಸ್ಪೂನ್ ಮಿಶ್ರ ಗಿಡಮೂಲಿಕೆಗಳು ಮತ್ತು 2 ಟೀಸ್ಪೂನ್ ಕೊತ್ತಂಬರಿ ಸೇರಿಸಿ. 3. ಎಲ್ಲವನ್ನೂ ಚೆನ್ನಾಗಿ ಬೆರೆಸಲಾಗಿದೆಯೆ ಎಂದು ಖಚಿತಪಡಿಸಿಕೊಳ್ಳಿ. 4. ಈಗ 2 ಟೀಸ್ಪೂನ್ ಬೆಳ್ಳುಳ್ಳಿ ಚೀಸ್ ಒಂದು ತುಂಡು ಬ್ರೆಡ್ ಮೇಲೆ ತುಂಬಿಸಿ. 5. ಕೆಲವು ಬೆಣ್ಣೆ ಅಥವಾ ಪೂರ್ವಭಾವಿಯಾಗಿ ಕಾಯಿಸಿ ಮತ್ತು 180 ಡಿಗ್ರಿ ಸೆಲ್ಸಿಯಸ್‌ನಲ್ಲಿ 10 ನಿಮಿಷಗಳ ಕಾಲ ತಯಾರಿಸಿ. 6. 3 ನಿಮಿಷಗಳ ಕಾಲ ಅಥವಾ ಚೀಸ್ ಸಂಪೂರ್ಣವಾಗಿ ಕರಗುವವರೆಗೆ ಕವರ್ ಮಾಡಿ ಮತ್ತು ತಳಮಳಿಸುತ್ತಿರು ಎಂದು ಖಚಿತಪಡಿಸಿಕೊಳ್ಳಿ. 7. ಅಂತಿಮವಾಗಿ, ಬಯಸಿದ ಆಕಾರಕ್ಕೆ ಕತ್ತರಿಸಿ ಚೀಸ್ ಬೆಳ್ಳುಳ್ಳಿ ಬ್ರೆಡ್ ಅನ್ನು ಬಡಿಸಿ.
